1000657234.english: So you can just hit it.

1000657237.english: - I carefully put pressure on the fingers that were resting on the keys.
1000657237.korean: - 조심스럽게 건반에 올린 손가락에 힘을 넣었다.

1000657238.english: - This time, a gentle melody of a clumsy but lovely piano piece, played by the two of them together, filled the air.
1000657238.korean: - 이번엔 둘이 함께 연주하는, 서툴지만 사랑스러운 피아노 곡이 은은하게 퍼졌다.

1000657241.english: No... I'm not just bad at dating, I'm also not good at dealing with other people. Because after that incident, I almost always lived talking only to machines and figures.
1000657241.korean: 아니... 연애뿐만 아니라, 다른 사람을 대하는 게 서툴러요. 그일이 있고나서 거의 항상 기계랑, 피규어랑만 이야기하고 살았으니까요.

1000657242.english: So I'm always worried about how my words will be perceived by others... I'm worried that if I do something because I like them, they might misinterpret it.
1000657242.korean: 그래서 항상, 제 말이 다른 사람에게 어떻게 보일까 신경 쓰이고... 제가 그분을 좋아해서 하는 행동을 반대로 받아들이면 어떡하지 하고, 걱정돼요.

1000657243.english: But... I don't feel that way when I'm by the commander's side.
1000657243.korean: 그런데... 사령관 곁에 있으면 그런 생각이 들지 않아요.

1000657244.english: No matter what I say or how I act... Because I believe you'll understand my sincerity.
1000657244.korean: 제가 무슨 말을 하든, 어떻게 행동하든... 제 진심을 알아줄 거라고, 믿으니까요.

1000657245.english: Heh, am I being a bit selfish? Me.

1000657246.english: - At first, I was definitely flustered, thinking, "What is this girl all about?" I used to think that, but not anymore.
1000657246.korean: - 확실히 처음에는 당황하기도 하고, 대체 이 아가씨는 뭐지? 하는 생각을 하기도 했지만, 지금은 아니다.

1000657247.english: - Because I know that even tho the expression is unique, when you get to know them, they're just speaking their true feelings as they are.
1000657247.korean: - 표현만 특이할뿐, 알고보면 있는 그대로 진심을 말한다는 걸 알고 있으니까.

1000657248.english: - After staring blankly at me for a while without saying a word, Azaz once again revealed his true feelings as they were.
1000657248.korean: - 내 말에 한동안 말없이 빤히 바라보던 아자즈는 이번에도 있는 그대로의 진심을 꺼냈다.

1000657251.english: - A romantic time under the moonlight, an experience I wonder if I'll ever have again.
1000657251.korean: - 또 이런 경험을 할 수 있을까 싶은, 달빛 아래에서의 로맨틱한 시간.

1000657252.english: - How long had it been? Only after being gently held by Azaz did I realize the hands covering my face were now at my chest.
1000657252.korean: - 얼마나 지났을까, 아자즈에게 부드럽게 붙잡히고 나서야 얼굴을 감싸고 있던 손이 가슴께를 향하고 있다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000657253.english: Just hold on a little longer. The rest are in the room, got it?

1000657255.english: Let's go to my room. I've prepared various things so we can both feel even better.
1000657255.korean: 제 방으로 가요. 서로 더 기분좋아질 수 있도록 이것저것 준비해 뒀어요.

1000657257.english: I'm not confident in dating, but... I've learned that kind of thing isn't really necessary. To the commander.
1000657257.korean: 연애에는 자신 없지만... 그런거, 별로 필요 없다는 건 배웠으니까요. 사령관한테.

1000657259.english: Could you carry me to my room?

1000657260.english: Thank you. After seeing a scene like this in a drama, I really wanted to try it.
1000657260.korean: 고마워요. 드라마에서 이런 장면을 보고 나서, 꼭 해보고 싶었거든요.

1000657261.english: - We walked back thru the snow-covered forest path, with Azaz, who was as happy as a child while being carried on my back.
1000657261.korean: - 등에 업힌채 아이처럼 즐거워하는 아자즈와 함께, 눈 쌓인 숲길을 걸어 돌아왔다.

1000657262.english: - Fortunately, Azaz's statement that he had something prepared was indeed a joke...
1000657262.korean: - 다행히 무언가 준비해뒀다는 아자즈의 말은 정말로 농담이었고...

1000657263.english: - Fortunately, we were able to confirm each other's feelings both physically and emotionally without needing anything like that.
1000657263.korean: - 더욱더 다행히, 그런 게 없이도 서로의 마음을 몸과 마음 양쪽으로 확인할 수 있었다.

1000657264.english: - While continuing my idle life, I suddenly realized something was missing.
1000657264.korean: - 빈둥거리는 생활을 계속하던 중, 문득 무언가 허전하다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000657265.english: - I went to meet them, and they also visited me, but there was one person who was conspicuously absent.
1000657265.korean: - 내가 만나러 가기도 하고, 방문을 받기도 했지만 유독 한 명이 보이지 않았다.

1000657266.english: - Arsenal, who would come find me whenever he had a chance, whether he was alone, with his squad members, or with other members... I haven't heard from them in a while.
1000657266.korean: - 혼자오든, 부대원들과 함께오든, 다른 대원들과 함께 오든 틈날 때마다 나를 찾아오던 아스널이... 한동안 나를 찾지 않았다.

1000657267.english: - The manager is Ferro, but I heard it was Arsenal who caused the trouble...
1000657267.korean: - 일단 점장은 페로지만, 일을 벌인 건 아스널이라고 듣긴 했는데...

1000657268.english: - I quickly put away the manga I was reading and the snacks, then left the captain's cabin.
1000657268.korean: - 읽던 만화책과 과자를 대충 치워두고 함장실을 나섰다.

1000657270.english: Oh, is it you, Big Brother? I'll guide you right away.

1000657272.english: Arsenal captain~! Big Brother, the commander has arrived!

1000657274.english: Hmm. It's as you see it.

1000657275.english: - As Arsenal said, the cafe was booming.

1000657276.english: - The hall is almost full of crew members drinking and chatting, and bunny girls are walking around serving.
1000657276.korean: - 홀은 술잔을 기울이며 이야기를 나누는 대원들로 거의 꽉 차있고, 바니걸들이 돌아다니며 서빙을 하고 있다.

1000657279.english: I'm sorry. I can't leave my seat right now.
1000657279.korean: 미안하군. 지금은 자리를 비울 수가 없어.

1000657280.english: If it's okay, could you come by after closing? Because I missed you too.
1000657280.korean: 괜찮다면 영업 끝나고 찾아와주겠나? 나도 그대가 보고 싶었으니까.

1000657281.english: Do that. I'm sorry, but we're fully booked today, so I'll have to show you to your room alone.
1000657281.korean: 그렇게 하도록. 미안하지만 오늘은 만실이라, 홀로 안내해주겠다.

1000657282.english: - Arsenal, who had led me to a corner seat in the hall, gave a small nod and went back to work.
1000657282.korean: - 나를 홀의 구석 자리로 안내해준 아스널은 작게 눈인사를 하곤 다시 일하러 가버렸다.

1000657283.english: If Cerestia is the embodiment of motherhood, then Arsenal can be said to be the embodiment of sexuality.
1000657283.korean: - 세레스티아가 모성의 화신이라면, 아스널은 성애의 화신이라고 할 수 있다.

1000657284.english: - Among the crew, there's probably no one more true to their emotions and desires than Arsenal.
1000657284.korean: - 대원들 중에 아스널보다 자기 감정과 욕구에 충실한 사람은 아마 없겠지.

1000657285.english: - And that Arsenal... Now, with a very happy expression, he is engrossed in his work at the cafe.
1000657285.korean: - 그런 아스널이... 지금은 몹시 즐거워보이는 얼굴로 카페 일에 열중하고 있다.

1000657286.english: - Sipping on a low-alcohol drink and chatting with the occasional teammate who joined me, my gaze still followed Arsenal.
1000657286.korean: - 도수가 낮은 술을 홀짝거리며, 간간이 합석하는 대원들과 이야기를 나누면서도 내 시선은 아스널을 쫓았다.

1000657287.english: - There was a strange sense of déjà vu seeing Arsenal serving with her long, flowing brown hair and laughing refreshingly while talking with the other members.
1000657287.korean: - 긴 갈색 생머리를 찰랑거리며 서빙을 하고, 다른 대원들과 이야기를 하며 시원하게 웃는 아스널의 모습에 묘한 기시감이 느껴졌다.

1000657288.english: - Arsenal is a team that really indulges its desires, and I'm not one to shy away from that either, so most of the time we spend together is... I think we did more than just kiss; we probably had sex.
1000657288.korean: - 워낙 욕구에 충실한 아스널이고, 나도 그런건 별로 사양하지 않다보니 둘이서 보내는 시간은 대부분... 이 아니라 100% 몸을 섞었던 것 같다.

1000657289.english: - Even if it's not a date, I've barely had normal conversations, not just philosophical ones.
1000657289.korean: -  데이트까지는 아니더라도, 필로 토크가 아닌 평범한 대화조차 별로 해본 적 없다.

1000657290.english: - Whether or not he knew my heart was a little troubled, Arsenal gave me a smile that seemed to melt every time our eyes met.
1000657290.korean: - 약간 착잡해진 내 마음을 아는지 모르는지, 아스널은 눈이 마주칠 때마다 녹아내릴 것 같은 눈웃음을 보냈다.

1000657291.english: - Time flew by, and it was soon closing time.
1000657291.korean: - 시간은 금방 흐르고, 곧 마감시간이 되었다.

1000657293.english: I've kept you waiting a long time. It took longer to organize than I thought.
1000657293.korean: 오래 기다리게 했군. 생각보다 정리에 더 시간이 걸렸어.

1000657294.english: In the quiet cafe, where not only the customers but also the staff had all left, Arsenal headed toward the counter.
1000657294.korean: - 손님들은 물론, 직원들까지 전부 떠난 조용한 카페에서 아스널은 카운터로 향했다.

1000657295.english: Would you come this way? Let me treat you to a drink.

1000657296.english: - As far as I know, Arsenal took a bottle of alcohol that wasn't very strong from the display case.
1000657296.korean: - 아스널은 내가 알기로 그렇게 도수가 높지 않은 술병을 진열장에서 꺼냈다.

1000657297.english: It's been a while since we've been alone together. Did you miss me?
1000657297.korean: 그대와 단둘이 있는 건 오랜만이군. 내가 그리웠나?

1000657298.english: - I accepted the glass Arsenal offered and lightly clinked it.
1000657298.korean: - 아스널이 내민 잔을 받고 가볍게 부딪혔다.

1000657299.english: If I were to make an excuse... Because I was busy.

1000657301.english: - Somehow, I could understand it right away. The Arsenal I saw during business hours definitely looked like they were having fun.
1000657301.korean: - 어쩐지 바로 납득할 수 있었다. 영업 시간 동안 본 아스널의 모습은, 틀림없이 즐거워 보였으니까.

1000657302.english: I've always wanted to run a cafe like this. Well, the manager is Miss Ferro for now, tho.
1000657302.korean: 예전부터 꼭, 이런 카페를 운영해보고 싶었지. 뭐, 일단 점장은 페로 양이다만.

1000657303.english: - Arsenal leaned their elbows on the counter, gazing at the half-empty glass of liquor sparkling in the light.
1000657303.korean: - 아스널은 카운터에 팔꿈치를 괴고 조명에 반짝이는, 술이 반쯤 남아있는 잔을 바라봤다.

1000657304.english: When I first met you, I thot it was just a wild dream, but... Now you're working in a nice cafe like this. Isn't that interesting?
1000657304.korean: 그대를 처음 만났을 때만해도 허황된 꿈이라고 생각했었지만... 지금은 이렇게, 번듯한 카페에서 일하고 있군. 재미있지 않나?

1000657305.english: Hmm, could it be that you were holding it in?

1000657306.english: Because we were in the stage of getting to know each other.

1000657307.english: - Arsenal chuckled and emptied their glass.

1000657308.english: At that time, I had just joined the Orca and the only thing I knew about humans was what was entered in the record module.
1000657308.korean: 그때 난, 막 오르카 호에 합류해서 인간에 대해 아는 거라곤 기록 모듈로 입력된 게 전부였지.

1000657309.english: However, after hearing others' evaluations of you, my doubts haven't been dispelled.
1000657309.korean: 그런데 다른 이들에게 그대의 평가를 듣고 의문이 가시질 않더군.

1000657310.english: Do you know what I was even thinking back then?
1000657310.korean: 그때 내가 무슨 생각까지 했는지 아나?

1000657311.english: - Before I knew it, the Arsenal was empty, so I filled my glass. Perhaps the alcohol was starting to kick in, as Arsenal's face turned red.
1000657311.korean: - 어느새 비어버린 아스널과 내 잔을 채웠다. 살짝 술기운이 올라오는 것인지, 아스널의 얼굴이 붉어졌다.

1000657312.english: I even thot there might be more than one commander. Ten out of ten people, everyone evaluated you differently.
1000657312.korean: 사령관이 한 명이 아니란 생각까지 했었다. 열이면 열, 전부 다른 식으로 그대를 평가했으니까.

1000657313.english: But... There was a common thread running thru all those stories.
1000657313.korean: 하지만... 그 모든 이야기에 공통점이 있었다.

1000657315.english: Everyone loved you. Rather than feeling like I was following the Supreme Commander, I felt like I was fighting to protect my beloved.
1000657315.korean: 모두가 그대를 사랑하고 있었다. 최고사령관을 따른다기보단, 사랑하는 연인을 지키기 위해 싸운다는 느낌을 받았다.

1000657316.english: And... That was the same for our cannoneer unit members.
1000657316.korean: 그리고... 그건 우리 캐노니어 부대원들도 마찬가지였지.

1000657317.english: I didn't have a chance to talk. Mutually... Because they were so engrossed in devouring each other's bodies.
1000657317.korean: 이야기할 기회가 없었지. 피차... 서로의 몸을 탐하느라 정신 없었으니까.

1000657318.english: You... Do you think that's bad?

1000657320.english: - Arsenal unwrapped the chocolate wrapper on the counter and put it in their mouth. And then...
1000657320.korean: - 아스널은 카운터에 놓여있는 초콜릿 포장지를 벗기고 입에 넣었다. 그리곤...

1000657322.english: - In the pressed mouths, the chocolate melts sweetly.
1000657322.korean: - 맞댄 입 안에서, 초콜릿이 달콤하게 녹아내린다.

1000657323.english: - Only when the chocolate had completely melted and the sweetness had disappeared from their mouths did Arsenal slowly part their lips.
1000657323.korean: - 초콜릿이 전부 녹고, 입 안에서 달콤한 맛이 사라질때가 되어서야 아스널은 천천히 입술을 뗐다.

1000657324.english: Did you understand what I wanted to say to you just now?
1000657324.korean: 내가 지금 그대에게 무슨 말을 하고싶은지, 전해졌나?

1000657325.english: - Arsenal, who had responded to my words with a refreshing smile, headed toward the stage set up on one side.
1000657325.korean: - 내 말에 시원한 미소로 대답한 아스널은 한 쪽에 마련된 무대 쪽으로 향했다.

1000657326.english: That's perfect timing. I was just about to ask you to tell me your impressions anyway.
1000657326.korean: 마침 잘됐군. 안그래도 그대에게 감상을 들려달라고 했는데 말이야.

1000657327.english: - The accompaniment started, and when Arsenal opened their mouths, I froze.
1000657327.korean: - 반주가 흘러나오고, 아스널이 입을 열자 나는 굳어져 버렸다.

1000657328.english: - A voice that's both ticklish and powerful, one I've never heard from Arsenal before.
1000657328.korean: - 간질거리면서도 힘 있는, 아스널에게서 한 번도 들어보지 못한 목소리.

1000657329.english: - Until the song was completely over, I just watched Arsenal singing, sending him sweet smiles.
1000657329.korean: - 노래가 전부 끝날 때까지, 나는 달콤한 눈웃음을 보내며 노래하는 아스널을 그저 바라보고만 있었다.

1000657331.english: - After the song ended, as I stood there blankly clapping, Arsenal gave me their trademark cool smile.
1000657331.korean: - 노래가 끝나고 멍하니 박수를 치는 내게 아스널은 트레이드 마크인 시원한 미소를 보냈다.

1000657332.english: Heh heh, did you like it?

1000657333.english: I've mastered the art of seduction, regardless of the type.
1000657333.korean: 남성을 유혹하는 기술은 종류를 불문하고 섭렵했으니까.

1000657334.english: Only for you, just one person.
1000657334.korean: 오로지 그대, 단 한 명만을 위해서.

1000657335.english: - In a way, it sounded like a joke or a boast, but... I could tell it was genuine.
1000657335.korean: - 어떻게 보면 농담같기도, 허세를 부리는 것 같기도 한 말이었지만... 진심이라는 것을 알 수 있었다.

1000657336.english: - I think it's not because the speaker is Arsenal, but because we understand each other.
1000657336.korean: - 말하는 사람이 아스널이라서가 아닌, 서로 마음이 통하는 사이라서라고 생각한다.

1000657337.english: So, I'd like to hear your thoughts on it.

1000657338.english: - After pondering for a while, I picked up the chocolate Arsenal had given me.
1000657338.korean: - 한동안 궁리하다 아스널이 내게 먹여주었던 초콜릿을 집어들었다.

1000657339.english: - I peeled off the wrapper and held it out, and Arsenal chuckled and bit the chocolate right off my finger.
1000657339.korean: - 포장지를 벗겨 내밀자, 아스널은 피식 웃으며 내 손가락째로 초콜릿을 입에 물었다.

1000657340.english: - Arsenal closed his eyes, savoring the chocolate in his mouth, and playfully licked my finger.
1000657340.korean: - 아스널은 눈을 감은채, 음미하듯 초콜릿을 입에 물고 내 손가락을 장난스럽게 핥아올렸다.

1000657341.english: I told you. They say you've mastered all the techniques to please a man.
1000657341.korean: 말했잖나. 남성을 기쁘게 하는 모든 기술을 섭렵했다고.

1000657342.english: - Saying that, Arsenal climbed onto the counter right in front of me.

1000657344.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 아스널의 허리에 팔을 감았다.

1000657346.english: Heh heh, sorry. I was too self-conscious because it's been a while.

1000657348.english: As usual, will you drive me crazy? My love.

1000657349.english: - With those words as the last we spoke, we didn't exchange another word until we cleaned up together in the morning and started preparing for opening.
1000657349.korean: - 그 말을 마지막으로, 아침에 함께 정리를 하고 오픈 준비를 시작할 때까지 우리는 단 한마디도 대화를 나누지 않았다.

1000657350.english: - Just by looking at their eyes, their breathing, and their small gestures... Because we could tell what the other person wanted.
1000657350.korean: - 눈빛과 숨소리, 작은 제스쳐만 보고도... 우리는 상대가 무엇을 원하는지 알 수 있었으니까.

1000657353.english: Oh, this looks kind of good.

1000657355.english: I wonder... Wait, when did you get here?!

1000657364.korean: 쉽지 않구만. 방화벽이 튼튼해서 다행이라고 해야할지... 어?

1000657369.english: It was all thanks to Alfred!

1000657370.english: Alfred is the best! The smartest in the world!

1000657371.english: Kuhuhu... I'll take care of everything...

1000657378.english: Tch, only at times like this...!

1000657393.english: No, let's go eat at a restaurant.

1000657396.english: Were you looking forward to it?

1000657405.english: If you're free, take a short break here.

1000657410.english: Sorry, I didn't think of that.

1000657411.english: No… there's no need for that.

1000657416.english: If it's something like that, I can handle it as much as needed.

1000657421.english: You don't have to hold back. I'll take it all, whatever it is.

1000657432.english: This reminds me of the old days. The two of us like this.

1000657433.english: We couldn't afford to relax like this, though.

1000657447.english: Yeah. I can't get up unless Constantia wakes me.
1000657447.korean: 응. 난 콘스탄챠가 안 깨워주면 못 일어나니까.

1000657449.english: It just happened. Just now. With you, Constantia.

1000657450.english: You didn't nag me like this in the past, either.

1000657454.english: You're not getting any sleep today.

1000657456.english: I guess this is about the right time...

1000657457.english: Uh, yeah… but what's with the piano?

1000657461.english: Azaz getting flustered—what a rare sight.

1000657462.english: Ah… sorry. I didn't mean it like that.

1000657465.english: No… I was talking about the song.
