1000657467.english: I just thought… you know, it was a song Azaz was singing for me.
1000657467.korean: 그냥 뭐랄까... 아자즈가 불러주는 노래라고만 생각했어.

1000657469.english: Huh? I don't know how to play though?

1000657482.english: Is it because of the café?

1000657483.english: Didn't see them last time I went, so I should stop by.
1000657483.korean: 저번에 갔을 때 얼굴을 못 봤으니까 한 번 가봐야겠군.

1000657484.english: No. I'm just dropping by today. Is Arsenal here?
1000657484.korean: 아냐. 오늘은 잠깐 들린거라. 아스널 있어?

1000657486.english: Just. Wanted to see your face.

1000657487.english: Ah… then I'll just wait here. I don't have anything planned today anyway.
1000657487.korean: 아... 그럼 그냥 여기서 기다릴게. 오늘 예정도 없고.

1000657489.english: Didn't know you had that side...

1000657490.english: Come to think of it… the two of us didn't really enjoy other things together, huh.
1000657490.korean: 그러고보니... 둘이서는 별로 다른 걸 즐기지는 않았지.

1000657491.english: Seems like we already know what we're doing today.
1000657491.korean: 오늘 할 일은 뭐... 정해져 있네.

1000657493.english: Honestly… yeah. When someone who always came around suddenly stops, it hits you.
1000657493.korean: 솔직히... 맞아. 항상 찾아오던 사람이 안 오니까.

1000657496.english: Come to think of it… when we first met, you tested me, didn't you?
1000657496.korean: 그러고보니... 처음 만났을 때 나를 시험했었지?

1000657502.english: Mm… not really, I wouldn't say so.

1000657505.english: ...Why are you so good at singing?

1000657510.english: I know that all too well.

1000657513.english: - While walking back after my evening stroll, I heard a strange noise and stopped in my tracks.
1000657513.korean: - 밤 산책을 마치고 돌아가던 중, 무언가 이상한 소리를 듣고 걸음을 멈췄다.

1000657514.english: - Following the direction of the sound, I headed toward CAFE amor. Up close, I can see a faint light leaking out from the crack in the door.
1000657514.korean: - 소리의 방향을 따라 CAFE amor로 향했다. 가까이서보니 문 틈으로 희미하게 빛이 새어나오고 있다.

1000657515.english: - As I entered the cafe, the lights were on in the main area.
1000657515.korean: - 카페 안으로 들어가자 홀에는 조명이 들어와 있었다.

1000657516.english: - I followed the sound of the singing and headed inside.

1000657517.english: - What I saw thru the slightly ajar door of the VIP room was...
1000657517.korean: - VIP룸의 살짝 열린 문틈으로 보인 것은...

1000657518.english: - It was Perrault, facing the mirror and singing with the cutest gestures and expressions.
1000657518.korean: - 거울을 마주보고, 한껏 귀여운 율동과 표정을 지으며 노래하는 페로였다.

1000657521.english: Please go away, Master. Because I want to die.

1000657523.english: - Of all people, it had to be Ferro making the cutest face and going "Kyu-kyu!" And the moment I said that and made an unknown sound, our eyes met...
1000657523.korean: - 하필 페로가 한껏 귀여운 표정을 지으며 뀨뀨! 하고 정체불명의 소리를 내는 순간 눈이 마주쳤고...

1000657524.english: - At that adorable sight I'd never seen before, I naturally burst out laughing.
1000657524.korean: - 한 번도 본 적 없는 그 귀여운 모습에 나는 당연히 박장대소.

1000657525.english: - After freezing for a good 30 seconds, Ferro's face crumpled, and he burrowed into the corner of the room, right into the gap between the sofa cushions.
1000657525.korean: - 30초는 족히 얼어붙어 있던 페로는 울상이 되더니 그대로 방 구석, 소파 사이의 틈에 틀어박혀버렸다.

1000657526.english: ... The master I know only laughs "Puhahaha!" when they see something interesting. But you're smiling.
1000657526.korean: ...제가 아는 주인님께서는, 무언가 재미있는 걸 보셨을때만 '푸하하하!'하고 웃으십니다만.

1000657527.english: Oh, then you're not my master. Please go back now.
1000657527.korean: 아, 그렇다면 제 주인님이 아니신거군요. 이만 돌아가 주세요.

1000657528.english: - This... They seem to be really upset...

1000657529.english: - It's a bit out of the blue, but Ferro has cat genes. That is to say, they are similar in behavior and personality to cats, at least to some extent, if not entirely.
1000657529.korean: - 새삼스럽지만, 페로에게는 고양이 유전자가 있다. 그것은 곧, 전부는 아닐지라도 어느정도는 고양이와 행동 양식이나 성격이 유사하다는것.

1000657530.english: - Thanks to this, Ferro has a calm and diligent personality, but sometimes he does some eccentric things or shows his "cat-like" side.
1000657530.korean: - 덕분에 페로는 침착하고 성실한 성격을 가졌으면서도, 몇 가지 기행을 벌이거나 '고양이스러운' 성격을 드러낼 때가 있다.

1000657531.english: - A prime example is when they climb onto my desk and curl up, or when they're really sulking like they are now.
1000657531.korean: - 내 책상 위에 올라가서 웅크리고 있거나, 지금처럼 제대로 삐쳤을 때가 대표적이다.

1000657533.english: - Even my ultimate companion move, the head scratch, didn't work this time.
1000657533.korean: - 심지어 이번엔 나의 대 컴패니언 필살기인 쓰다듬기조차 먹히지 않았다.

1000657534.english: As expected... I shouldn't have listened to that.
1000657534.korean: 역시... 그 말을 듣는 게 아니었어요.

1000657535.english: Cute things definitely don't suit me...

1000657538.english: - The answer that came from Ferro, who had been hesitating for a long time, was completely unexpected.
1000657538.korean: - 한참을 망설이던 페로에게서 나온 대답은 완전 뜻밖의 것이었다.

1000657540.english: Gap moe... Because they said I should aim for it.

1000657542.english: - Just a month ago, I didn't even know these words existed.
1000657542.korean: - 불과 한 달 전만 해도 나는 이런 단어의 존재조차 몰랐다.

1000657543.english: - But now that I've absorbed the information left behind on the ark, I know that this word means expressing charm by showing an unexpected side that you don't usually see.
1000657543.korean: - 하지만 방주에 남겨진 정보들을 흡수한 지금의 나는, 이 단어가 평소에는 볼 수 없는 의외의 모습을 보여주는 것을 통한 매력 표출이라는 뜻임을 알고 있다.

1000657544.english: - Therefore... I can't help but be struck by the gap moe that's overflowing from Ferro right now.
1000657544.korean: - 그러므로... 지금 페로의 갭 모에가 가득한 모습에 심장을 강타당할 수밖에.

1000657546.english: - Forcibly squeezing past the sofa where Ferro was huddled, I nestled his soft body in my arms.
1000657546.korean: - 억지로 페로가 틀어박혀있는 소파틈을 비집고 들어가서, 부드러운 몸을 품에 안았다.

1000657548.english: - Ferro's tail is standing straight up thru the narrow gap. I don't have to fall off.
1000657548.korean: - 좁은 틈 사이로 페로의 꼬리가 곧게 서있다. 안 떨어져도 되겠군.

1000657550.english: - Ferro's tail began to tremble. And her ears, which were folded down from wearing the bunny headband, perk up too.
1000657550.korean: - 페로의 꼬리가 파르르 떨리기 시작했다. 그리고 토끼 머리띠를 쓰느라 접힌 귀도 쫑긋거린다.

1000657551.english: - And yet, her expression was still sulky, as if she were still pouting. Because of these things, Ferro can already be considered a gap moe bundle.
1000657551.korean: - 그러면서도 표정은 아직 삐쳤다는 듯 새침. 이런 것들로 인해 페로는 이미 갭 모에 덩어리라고 할 수 있다.

1000657552.english: - And what's this bunny girl outfit all about?
1000657552.korean: - 그리고 이 바니걸 의상은 또 뭐란 말인가.

1000657553.english: - Instead of her usual pure white, lace-trimmed outfit, she was wearing the complete opposite: a jet-black, simple, classic bunny girl costume.
1000657553.korean: - 평소의 새하얀, 레이스 장식이 달린 의상이 아니라 정반대의 새카맣고 심플한, 정석적인 바니걸.

1000657554.english: - Even though the image has completely changed, the slightly flushed face in the unfamiliar outfit is truly-
1000657554.korean: - 이미지를 완전히 바꾸면서도, 익숙하지 않은 복장에 살짝 붉은 기가 감도는 얼굴이 정말로-

1000657556.english: - My impassioned speech seemed to finally soften Ferro's heart, and he gave a small smile.
1000657556.korean: - 내 열변에 페로는 그제서야 마음이 풀린듯 작게 미소 지었다.

1000657557.english: No, you can't. It's almost time for the cafe to open.
1000657557.korean: 안 돼요. 카페 개점 시간이 되어버리는걸요.

1000657558.english: - Even as he said that, Ferro's tail was still wagging happily.
1000657558.korean: - 그렇게 말하면서도 여전히 페로의 꼬리는 기분좋게 살랑이고 있었다.

1000657559.english: - Gazing at it, I absentmindedly kissed the prominent collarbone.
1000657559.korean: - 그것을 바라보다, 도드라진 쇄골에 무심코 입을 맞췄다.

1000657561.english: - Ferro covered his mouth with both hands and stared at me with wide eyes.
1000657561.korean: - 페로는 양 손으로 입을 막은 채, 휘둥그레진 눈으로 나를 바라봤다.

1000657564.english: - Ferro flinched and shuddered. Her slender neck, encircled by a choker, flushed red.
1000657564.korean: - 페로가 움찔 몸을 떨었다. 초커에 감싸인 가느다란 목덜미가 붉게 달아 올랐다.

1000657566.english: - Ferro slowly removed the hand that had been covering his mouth and then...
1000657566.korean: - 페로는 입을 막았던 손을 천천히 치우곤...

1000657568.english: If I get caught like this by my master...

1000657569.english: - Ferro grabbed my hand and pulled me down onto the sofa. Her silver hair, tied in pigtails, cascaded down with a rustle.
1000657569.korean: - 페로는 내 손을 잡아끌며 소파에 누웠다. 양갈래로 묶은 은발이 사라락 흘러내렸다.

1000657570.english: I... You won't be able to stop them from talking, will you...?

1000657571.english: - On this day, I was able to hear Ferro's voice, which was even cuter and sweeter than the cute song I had heard earlier.
1000657571.korean: - 이날, 나는 아까 들었던 귀여운 노래보다도 더 귀엽고 달콤한 페로의 목소리를 들을 수 있었다.

1000657572.english: - After spending time together until the very last minute, I couldn't help but smile at the cute song Ferro performed, and then I had to comfort him all day.
1000657572.korean: - 아슬아슬할 때까지 함께 시간을 보내고 난 뒤, 페로가 선보인 귀여운 노래에 나도 모르게 흐뭇한 웃음을 지었다가 하루종일 달래줘야 했다는 건 덤이다.

1000657582.english: Were you trying to sing a cute song?

1000657586.english: Oh, it's cozy. Now I get why Ferro sometimes crawls into boxes or tight spaces.
1000657586.korean: 오, 아늑한걸. 페로가 가끔 상자나 좁은 틈에 들어가는 이유를 알겠어.

1000657588.english: You don't have to sing a song like that.
1000657588.korean: 굳이 그런 노래 안 해도 돼.

1000657589.english: Even without singing a cute song, you're already cute, Ferro.
1000657589.korean: 귀여운 노래를 안 불러도 원래 귀여운걸, 페로는.

1000657590.english: Really? I could talk about how cute Ferro is for another 10 hours.
1000657590.korean: 그래? 난 페로가 귀여운 점을 앞으로 10시간은 더 떠들 수 있는데.

1000657594.english: Huh...? You're giving this to me...? Waaa... I didn't know anything, I was clumsy and so nervous I kept making mistakes... This time it's not a dream, right, Commander? Really, truly real? Yes! From the moment I first met the Commander I've been waiting only for this moment. ...I'm imperfect, but please take care of me from now on, Brother...
1000657594.korean: 어...? 저, 저한테 이걸... 정말인 거죠...? 히잉... 아무것도 몰라서 덤벙대고, 잔뜩 긴장해서 실수만 연발하던&n제가... 사령관님에게... 이번에는 꿈 아니죠? 정말, 진짜인 거죠? 네! 사령관님을 처음 만났을 때부터&n지금까지 줄곧 이 순간만을 기대해왔어요. ...부족한 몸이지만 앞으로도 잘 부탁드려요. 오빠...

1000657595.english: ...I see. Bunny King didn't like reverse-bunny—he liked me, Niba. Looking back there were so many hints; why didn't I notice...? Yes, that was it. A pink mist called love blurred my vision...! Nihihi, now that the mist has cleared, I can seize true lo-o-ve...! Ah, ahaha... I overdid it a bit. It's so embarrassing... Huh? I have to say it too? N-now...? ...Um... I love you, Commander.
1000657595.korean: ...그렇구나. 바니 대왕 씨는 역바니가 아니라... 바로 나, 니바를 좋아하는 거였어. 돌이켜보면 힌트들이 정말 많았는데,&n어째서 몰랐던 걸까... 그래, 그거였어. 사랑이라는 이름의 핑크빛 안개가 내 시야를 흐리게 하고 있었던 거야...!&n니히히, 그 안개가 사라진 지금이야말로, 진정한 러-브를 쟁취할 수...! 아, 아하하... 살짝 오버했네. 영 부끄러워서...&n에? 나도 말해야 돼? 지, 지금...? ...그, 그게 있지. 음... 사랑해, 사령관 씨.

1000657596.english: This means you... no, Master loves me, right...? Since I've behaved so well until now, it means you won't throw me away... right...? Eheh... Master, what do you want to do now? Or should I bring something to eat? Or—anything, just say it. If it's what Master asks, I'll do anything...
1000657596.korean: 이거, 네가... 아니 주인님이 날 사랑한다는 뜻인 거지...? 지금까지 착하게 굴었으니까,&n버리지 않는다는 뜻... 맞지...? 에헷.... 주인님, 지금 뭐 하고 싶어? 아니면 먹을 거 가져올까?&n그것도 아니면... 뭐든 말만 해줘. 나... 주인님이 시키는 거라면 뭐든지 해줄 수 있으니까...

1000657597.english: It took a long time. How many roads I've walked... Well, I was sure a day like today would come. ...Why? Because the Commander told me that if it were me, I could accomplish anything. Of course I believed the things I most wished for would come true. After this... I haven't imagined it well, so will you tell me step by step?
1000657597.korean: 오래 걸렸네요. 얼마나 많은 길을 돌아왔는지... 뭐, 오늘 같은 날이 올 거란 확신은 있었지만요.&n...왜냐구요? 사령관님이 저라면 뭐든 해낼 거라고 말해주셨잖아요. 당연히 제가 가장 바라던 일들이&n이뤄질 거라 믿고 있었죠. 이 다음엔... 상상으로밖에 안 해봐서 잘 모르는데... 하나씩 알려주실래요?

1000657600.english: Thus, the dignity of the Great Demon King is 100% reproduced... It took time to dry the enamel, but the quality is satisfactory.
1000657600.korean: 이로써 대마왕님의 품위가 100% 재현됐다... 에나멜을 말리는데 시간이 걸렸지만 만족스러운 품질이군.

1000657601.english: If it sells better than the magical girl figures, it'll help rebuild the Demon King's army.
1000657601.korean: 마법소녀놈들 피규어보다 많이 팔면 마왕군 재건에 보탬이 되겠지.

1000657603.english: Great Demon King? What's the matter?

1000657604.english: Please wait, the ventilation isn't complete yet... please come in!

1000657605.english: Goltharion, I have something serious to talk about.

1000657606.english: Yes? What is it, Great Demon King?

1000657608.english: Let's rebuild the Demon King's army!

1000657610.english: Huh? That's... Niba from Densetsu and the boss...?
1000657610.korean: 어? 저건... 덴세츠의 니바 씨랑 사장님...?

1000657613.english: The Commander joined the reverse Bunny side saying they're the best over there... and things are going strangely.
1000657613.korean: 사령관님이 역바니가 최고라며 저쪽에 합류하셔서... 상황이 이상하게 돌아가고 있어요.

1000657615.english: Because of that, we're coming up with countermeasures among ourselves. Moonbit is helping too.
1000657615.korean: 그것 때문에 저희들끼리 대책을 세우는 중이에요. 백토님도 도와주고 계시구요.

1000657616.english: If you have time later, Faucre, please come by!

1000657617.english: Niba just joined not long ago, and already there are that many people...
1000657617.korean: 니바 씨가 합류한지 얼마 되지도 않았는데 벌써 저만큼 많은 분들과...

1000657619.english: Back in the day, the Demon King's army was that big too. If we recover our forces then, do you think the boss will visit our side too?
1000657619.korean: 옛날엔 마왕군도 저만큼 많았는데. 그때 군세를 회복하면 사장님이 우리 쪽에도 놀러와주실까요.

1000657621.english: Ahem! This isn't the time to be like this! I'm going to get serious about the Demon King duties I've been neglecting until now.
1000657621.korean: 흠흠! 이러고 있을 때가 아니에요! 여태 소홀했던 마왕 업무에 진지해지겠어요.

1000657622.english: The Demon King's army is being revived!

1000657623.english: ...I hope Moonbit didn't hear that by any chance?

1000657626.english: Finally... finally, is it time for our Demon King's army to set out for world conquest?
1000657626.korean: 드디어... 드디어 저희 마왕군이 세계정복에 나설 차례입니까!

1000657627.english: Uh... similar, but a little different...

1000657629.english: Huh? G-Goltharion. You're not crying right now, are you?
1000657629.korean: 응? 고, 골타리온. 설마 지금 울어요?

1000657630.english: It was a long endurance, Great Demon King...

1000657631.english: To lure the magical girls into letting their guard down, the Great Demon King infiltrated for so long that his way of speaking changed...
1000657631.korean: 마법 소녀들의 방심을 유도하기 위해 대마왕님께서 잠입해서 말투가 바뀔 만큼 오랜 시간...

1000657633.english: I always worried whether the Great Demon King was negatively influenced by the magical girls... whether he forgot his mission...
1000657633.korean: 설마 대마왕님이 마법 소녀들에게 안 좋은 영향을 받은 건 아닌지... 사명을 잊어버리시기라도 한 건 아닌지, 늘 걱정했었습니다만...

1000657634.english: But when you said to revive the Demon King's army, I... sob...!

1000657636.english: D-Don't cry. Goltharion, stop the tears.
1000657636.korean: 우, 울지 마요. 골타리온, 눈물 그쳐요.

1000657637.english: ...How long! How long must it have been for the Great Demon King's way of speaking to still... wahhhhh...!
1000657637.korean: ...얼마나! 얼마나 오랜 시간이었으면 대마왕님의 말투가 아직도... 크허어어어어엉!

1000657638.english: S-Stop crying! I, the Lord, am commanding you!
1000657638.korean: 우, 울음을 그치거라! 본좌가 명령하고 있지 않느냐.

1000657639.english: Goltharion XIII, the loyal subordinate of the Witch Queen Faucre who can make even crying children stop crying!
1000657639.korean: 우는 아이도 뚝 그치게 만드는 마의 여왕, 뽀끄루의 심복. 골타리온 XIII세여!

1000657641.english: Kuhuhuhu... Kahahahahaha! The Witch Legion Commander, Goltharion XIII. I have been eagerly awaiting the Great Demon King's summons.
1000657641.korean: 크흐흐... 크하하하하하하! 마의 군단장, 골타리온 XIII세. 대마왕님의 부름만을 목 놓아 기다렸습니다.

1000657642.english: The plans for the revival of the Demon King's army are ready.
1000657642.korean: 마왕군 부활을 위한 계획서들이 준비돼 있습니다.

1000657643.english: Please understand that the amount is insufficient, not even reaching 80,000 copies. We were pressed for time preparing the funds for the revival.
1000657643.korean: 8만장이 채 되지 않는 미흡한 분량이나 양해해 주십시오. 부흥 자금을 마련하느라 시간이 촉박했습니다.

1000657645.english: I'll bring them right away, Great Demon King.

1000657647.english: I didn't expect Goltharion to take the Demon King's army so seriously...
1000657647.korean: 골타리온이 마왕군을 이렇게까지 진지하게 생각했을 줄은...

1000657648.english: It's true that I've been inactive as the Demon King until now. I'll do my best from now on...!
1000657648.korean: 지금까지 마왕으로서 활동이 뜸했던 건 사실이에요. 앞으로 저도 노력할게요...!

1000657649.english: Then, let's begin the 1st Demon King's Army Revival Meeting.
1000657649.korean: 그럼, 제1회 마왕군 부흥 회의를 시작하겠습니다.

1000657650.english: Have you checked the handouts, Great Demon King Faucre?

1000657651.english: Yes. I read it, but the title is...

1000657652.english: "First Step in the Next-Generation Talent Training Education System," you mean?
1000657652.korean: "차세대 인재 양성 교육 시스템의 첫걸음" 말씀이십니까?

1000657654.english: While the Great Demon King was spying on the magical girls, I also learned business management for the future of the Demon King's army.
1000657654.korean: 대마왕님께서 마법소녀들을 염탐하실 때, 저 또한 마왕군의 미래를 위해 기업운영을 습득했습니다.

1000657655.english: I drafted a plan to select and nurture talented personnel by introducing various four major insurances, welfare benefits, and incentive systems. Kuhuhuhuhu...!
1000657655.korean: 각종 4대보험 및 복리후생, 인센티브 제도를 도입하여 유능한 인재를 선출. 육성하는 방향으로 가안을 잡았습니다. 크흐흐흐흐...!

1000657656.english: Is there any clause that needs to be reinforced or omitted?

1000657658.english: ...It must have been hard studying all that. Good job.

1000657660.english: My dream is for the Great Demon King to achieve world domination. To witness that up close...
1000657660.korean: 제 꿈은 대마왕님이 세계정복의 비원을 달성하시는 것. 그걸 가장 가까이서 지켜보기 위해서라면...

1000657661.english: Even if my body turns to dust and crumbles, I will stand by the Great Demon King!
1000657661.korean: 설령 제 몸이 가루가 되어 부서진다해도 대마왕님과 함께할 겁니다!

1000657662.english: Uh... you don't have to push yourself that far...

1000657664.english: ...Hehe, as expected of my loyal subordinate, Goltharion. What a splendid mindset.
1000657664.korean: ...후후, 역시 나의 심복 골타리온. 훌륭한 마음가짐이구나.

1000657665.english: Good! I grant you permission to stand by my side!
1000657665.korean: 좋다! 본좌의 옆에 서는 걸 허락하마!

1000657667.english: Th-then... can I use this to contract with the others?
1000657667.korean: 그, 그럼... 이걸 가지고 다른 분들과 계약하면 될까요?

1000657668.english: Yes. The Four Heavenly Kings of the Demon King's army consist of four commanders, including myself, so hiring the three who will be the leadership is a priority.
1000657668.korean: 그렇습니다. 마왕군의 사천왕은 저를 포함한 4명의 군단장들로 이루어져있어, 수뇌가 될 3명을 채용하는 게 우선입니다.

1000657669.english: The commander of the Demon Legion... is currently vacant, so there's nothing we can do.
1000657669.korean: 마수군단의 군단장은... 현재는 공석이니까, 어쩔 수 없겠네요.

1000657670.english: He's a tough guy, so he's probably alive somewhere.

1000657671.english: I know someone worthy of the title of "Witch of Inferno" to lead the Demon Legion.
1000657671.korean: 마도군단을 이끌 "업화의 마녀"에 걸맞는 자는 제가 알고 있습니다.

1000657672.english: Witch of Inferno...? Was such a person on the Orca?
1000657672.korean: "업화의 마녀"...? 그런 분이 오르카 호에 계셨나요.

1000657673.english: If so, I'll go and persuade him. He's the Demon King, so I should step forward myself.
1000657673.korean: 그렇다면 제가 가서 설득할게요. 명색이 대마왕이니 직접 나서야죠.

1000657674.english: Pfft... Don't worry. That talented person is already a member of our Demon King's army. There's no need for His Majesty to bother with him.
1000657674.korean: 후... 걱정하지 마십시오. 이미 그 인재는 저희 마왕군 소속이나 마찬가지. 굳이 대마왕님께서 번거롭게 나서실 필요도 없습니다.

1000657675.english: Leave it to me. I'll recruit him right away... Keuhehe... Keuhahahahaha!
1000657675.korean: 저한테 맡겨 주십시오. 금방 포섭해 오겠습니다... 크흐흐... 크하하하하하!

1000657677.english: This means my work is done too.

1000657678.english: Phew... Now, if I just report the results to the organizers... Huh? What's going on?
1000657678.korean: 휴우... 이제 주최하시는 분들한테 결과만 보고하면... 응? 무슨 일이십니까?

1000657679.english: You're pouring all your hatred and resentment toward the world into a mere snowdrift and then returning?
1000657679.korean: 세상을 향한 증오와 원망을 고작 눈더미에 쏟아붓고 복귀하는가.

1000657681.english: You... possess the embers of evil that would satisfy you only if you incinerate everything in the world.
1000657681.korean: 넌... 세계에 존재하는 모든 것을 불태워야 만족할 악의 불씨를 지니고 있다.

1000657682.english: My main job is incineration, but what are you talking about?
1000657682.korean: 제 주업무가 소각이긴 한데, 무슨 소릴 하시는 겁니까?

1000657683.english: My eyes cannot be deceived, Ignis. No! "Witch of Inferno."
1000657683.korean: 내 눈은 속일 수 없다, 이그니스. 아니! "업화의 마녀"여.

1000657684.english: Won't you join our Demon King's army? We'll conquer the world together!
1000657684.korean: 우리 마왕군에 합류하지 않겠나? 함께 세계를 정복하는 거다!

1000657685.english: Let's talk again tomorrow. I just finished work and I'm tired.
1000657685.korean: 내일 다시 얘기하시죠. 방금 업무가 끝나 피곤합니다.

1000657686.english: No, that can't be. I'd like you to give me a definitive answer right here and now.
1000657686.korean: 아니, 그럴 수 없다. 이 자리에서 확답해줬으면 좋겠군.

1000657688.english: Why, why are you doing this? Please step aside.

1000657689.english: Hahahaha! I couldn't go until I signed... Ugh!
1000657689.korean: 크하하하! 싸인하기 전까지 못 간... 크악!

1000657690.english: Idiot! What are you doing, Goltharion! What if you're bothering someone else?!
1000657690.korean: 바보! 뭐하는 거예요, 골타리온! 다른 분한테 폐 끼치면 어떡해요!

1000657691.english: D-Demon King? Just wait a minute, I was just about to finalize my contract with the Witch of Fire...
1000657691.korean: 대, 대마왕님? 조금만 기다리시면 업화의 마녀와 계약을 마치려던 참이었습니다만...

1000657692.english: How could that be possible in that conversation just now?!

1000657693.english: I'm sorry, Ignis-sama. Did Goltharion cause trouble?

1000657694.english: No, it's fine. It's just that I've been working nonstop since yesterday...
1000657694.korean: 아니오, 괜찮습니다. 다만 제가 어제부터 계속 근무해서...

1000657695.english: Could you briefly explain what your business is?
1000657695.korean: 어떤 용무인지 간단히 말씀해주실 수 있으십니까?

1000657697.english: ...That's why we've formed the Demon King's Army this time.

1000657698.english: If you don't mind... No, I really hope you'll join, Ignis-sama.
1000657698.korean: 괜찮으시다면... 아니, 꼭 이그니스 님께서 합류해주셨으면 해요.

1000657699.english: Are you talking about me? Why me...

1000657700.english: Ignis-sama is well-respected and wise enough to listen to others' concerns.
1000657700.korean: 이그니스님께서는 다른 분들 고민을 들어줄 만큼 인망도 두텁고, 지혜가 깊으시니까요.

1000657701.english: Even if Goltharion or I stray, he'll be there to correct us!
1000657701.korean: 저나 골타리온이 엇나가더라도 옆에서 바로잡아 주시겠죠!

1000657702.english: As expected of the Great Demon King... so humble...

1000657703.english: Did you hear, Witch of Karma? With the Great Demon King praising you so highly, you wouldn't be rejecting me, would you?
1000657703.korean: 들었나, 업화의 마녀? 대마왕님께서 이렇게까지 평가하는데 설마 거절하려는 건 아니겠지?

1000657707.english: Understood. I will accept Faucre's offer.

1000657709.english: Hehehehehe...! Is it time to sign the devil's contract?

1000657710.english: Take this, Witch of Fire. Make a vow thicker than blood.
1000657710.korean: 받아라, 업화의 마녀. 피보다 진한 맹세를 맺어라.

1000657711.english: This is a standard employment contract.

1000657712.korean: 크하하하하! 두 장 겹치게 싸인해라, 알겠나?

1000657713.english: With these two members, we can reunite the Four Heavenly Kings!
1000657713.korean: 이걸로 두 분만 모집하면 사천왕 재결성이네요!

1000657714.english: It seems things are going well. The Demon King's Army will be rebuilt in no time!
1000657714.korean: 뭔가 잘 풀리고 있는 것 같아요. 마왕군도 금방 재건하겠어요!

1000657717.english: What are you talking about, Witch of Fire? Didn't it clearly state in the contract?
1000657717.korean: 무슨 소릴 하는 거지, 업화의 마녀. 계약서에도 명시해두지 않았나.

1000657718.english: We must wear the prescribed attire so as not to lower the dignity of the Demon King's Army.
1000657718.korean: 마왕군의 품격을 떨어뜨리지 않도록 규정된 복장을 갖춰 입어야 한다고.

1000657719.english: Could it be that you're belittling the Demon's contract right now!?
1000657719.korean: 설마 지금 마의 계약을 하찮게 여기는 건가!

1000657720.english: That's quite severe. It's also my fault for not properly checking…
1000657720.korean: 정도가 심합니다. 제대로 확인하지 못한 제 탓도 있지만...

1000657721.english: From the next contract onward, I will also observe. We can't have more victims.
1000657721.korean: 다음 계약부터는 저도 참관하겠습니다. 다른 피해자가 발생하면 안 되니까요.

1000657725.english: Look. Isn't this outfit fitting for a wicked executive?
1000657725.korean: 보십시오. 악의 여간부에 걸맞는 복장이지 않습니까?

1000657726.english: Uh… the exposure… are you sure this is alright?

1000657727.english: …It's fine. After all, I signed the contract.

1000657728.english: Have you found the new Four Heavenly Kings?

1000657729.english: No... Everyone's busy preparing for the party...
1000657729.korean: 아뇨... 파티 준비 때문에 다들 바쁘셔서...

1000657730.english: No... Everyone was busy preparing for the party...
1000657730.korean: 별 소득 없이 빈 손으로 돌아왔어요... 우으...

1000657731.english: I came back empty-handed and without much to show for it... Ugh...
1000657731.korean: 남은 사천왕은 마수군단과 마룡군단을 이끌어야 합니다, 대마왕님.

1000657732.english: The remaining Four Heavenly Kings must lead the Beast and Dragon Legions, Your Majesty.
1000657732.korean: 그렇다면 여기서 제가 추천할 인재가 한명 더 있습니다!

1000657733.english: Well then, I have one more person I'd like to recommend!

1000657735.korean: 크흐흐흐... 바로 저희의 원수나 마찬가지인 마법소녀. 그들이 믿고 따르는...!

1000657736.english: Keuhehehe... The magical girl who's practically our enemy. The one they trust and follow...!

1000657737.korean: 사장님이...? 마수군단과 마룡군단이랑 어울릴 것 같진 않은데요.

1000657738.english: And you...? I don't think the Beast and Dragon Legions would get along.

1000657739.korean: 마수군단의 군단장이 되기 위한 기본 조건은 강인한 육체와 맹수 같은 성정.

1000657740.english: I'm not sure if you heard, but the Magical Gentleman reportedly becomes a fierce beast at night.
1000657740.korean: 들으셨는지 모르겠지만, 매지컬 젠틀맨은 밤에 흉폭한 짐승이 된다고 합니다.

1000657742.korean: 그, 그건 다른 걸 말하는 걸 텐데요...

1000657743.english: Regardless of his personality, with that physical ability, he's the perfect fit to lead the Beast Corps!
1000657743.korean: 진상이 어떻든 간에 그 신체능력이라면 마수군단을 이끌기엔 최적인 몸!

1000657744.english: The Demon King will personally persuade him. The Magical Gentleman…!
1000657744.korean: 대마왕님께서 직접 회유하시는 겁니다. 매지컬 젠틀맨을...!

1000657746.english: It's a cliché negotiation line, but there's the saying, "I'll give you half the world if you come under me."
1000657746.korean: 상투적인 협상 문구지만 "세계의 절반을 줄 테니 밑으로 들어오라"는 말이 있습니다.

1000657747.english: Also, since he is the last man left in the world, he would be suitable to carry on the Demon King's lineage. The son-in-law approach might not be bad either.
1000657747.korean: 또한, 세계에 남아있는 마지막 남자이니 대마왕님의 후대를 잇기에도 적합합니다. 데릴사위 방식도 나쁘지 않을 것 같습니다만.

1000657748.english: M-myself and the boss… carrying on the lineage…?

1000657749.english: Kuhahaha! We will take the Magical Gentleman away from those cunning magical girls. That is our Demon King's army's very method of evil…!
1000657749.korean: 크하하하! 간악한 마법소녀들로부터 매지컬 젠틀맨을 뺏어오는 겁니다. 그것이 저희 마왕군, 그야말로 악의 방식...!

1000657752.english: She's resting. It'll be a nuisance if we get involved.
1000657752.korean: 휴식 중이십니다. 저희까지 일 벌리면 민폐에요.

1000657753.english: That's why I'm offering you half the world and the position of companion to the Great Demon King, Faucre.
1000657753.korean: 그래서 세계의 절반과 뽀끄루 대마왕님의 반려 자리를 가지고 제안하는 거다.

1000657754.english: Or do you know of anyone more suitable for the position of Demon Beast Commander than a Magical Gentleman?
1000657754.korean: 아니면 마수군단장 자리에 매지컬 젠틀맨보다 적합한 인재를 알고 있나?

1000657755.english: I know of one, but... um...

1000657756.english: Okay, then I'll recommend someone. But that's the end of my discussion, Commander.
1000657756.korean: 알겠습니다, 그럼 제가 한명 추천드리죠. 대신 사령관님 얘기는 여기서 끝입니다.

1000657757.english: Keuhehehe... If that's the right person, then so be it.
1000657757.korean: 크흐흐흐... 그 자가 적합한 인재라면 그래야겠지.

1000657759.english: The CEO and I... Oh, we haven't even completed the third ritual yet...
1000657759.korean: 사장님이랑 제가... 아, 아직 세 번째 의식도 치르지 않았는데...

1000657760.english: Calling her "honey" or something... Hehe, hehehe...

1000657762.english: Those magical girls...! Did they put some kind of powerful hint on the Great Demon King?
1000657762.korean: 마법소녀 놈들...! 설마 대마왕님에게 강력한 암시라도 걸어놓은 건가!

1000657767.english: That's why I mentioned my concerns when I came.
1000657767.korean: 오면서 염려된다고 말씀드렸던 게 이것 때문입니다.

1000657768.english: Lady Atalanta possesses physical strength strong enough to be active in the Red Arena, but...
1000657768.korean: 아탈란테님은 붉은 아레나에서 활동할 만큼 강인한 신체능력을 지녔습니다만.

1000657769.english: I serve only the Goddess Artemis. I have no intention of serving anyone else.
1000657769.korean: 제가 모시는 분은 아르테미스 여신님 뿐. 다른 이를 섬길 생각은 없습니다.

1000657770.english: I appreciate your high regard for my abilities, but I will decline.
1000657770.korean: 능력을 높이 평가해주시는 건 감사하나, 거절하도록 하겠습니다.

1000657771.english: ...That's why I hesitated to recommend you.

1000657772.english: Um... Actually, there's someone else in charge of the Demon Beast Corps.
1000657772.korean: 저... 사실 마수군단을 담당하는 분은 따로 계세요.

1000657773.english: Could you please fill the vacancy until that person joins?
1000657773.korean: 그분이 합류하기 전까지만이라도 공석을 채워주시면 안 될까요?

1000657774.english: No matter how many times you ask, my answer remains the same.
1000657774.korean: 몇 번을 부탁하시더라도 제 대답은 똑같습니다.

1000657775.english: My life is dedicated solely to the great goddess of the hunt, Artemis...
1000657775.korean: 오직 제 삶은 위대한 사냥의 여신, 아르테미스님을 위해...

1000657777.english: How dare you refuse the offer of the Great Demon King just because of that Artemis or something...
1000657777.korean: 그깟 아르테미스인지 뭔지 때문에 감히 대마왕님의 권유를 거절하다니...

1000657778.english: Our Great Demon King is far greater than that insubstantial illusion!
1000657778.korean: 실체가 없는 허상보다 우리 대마왕님이 훨씬 위대한 분이시거늘!

1000657780.english: Goltharion, stop...! You're being rude to Lady Atalanta.

1000657781.english: Your Majesty, it's not bad to be humble, but you should be justified in your anger when compared to others.
1000657781.korean: 대마왕님. 겸손도 나쁘지 않지만, 다른 누구와 비교 당했을 땐 정당히 분노하셔야 합니다.

1000657782.english: You're making a fool of yourself, Your Majesty, you arrogant brat. Come with me. I'll tell you what to do.
1000657782.korean: 가만히 있자니 대마왕님을 아주 우습게 보는군, 건방진 녀석. 따라 나와라. 주제를 알려주마.

1000657783.english: How dare you insult Lady Artemis in front of me?

1000657784.english: Forget any hope of returning home safely.

1000657786.english: Mr. Goltharion is getting beaten up, shouldn't we stop it?
1000657786.korean: 골타리온 씨가 쥐어 터지고 있는데 말려야 되지 않겠습니까?

1000657787.english: If it's Goltharion, it's okay, I trust him.

1000657788.english: Let's have a short meeting right now. Are there any other suitable candidates?
1000657788.korean: 지금이라도 짧게 회의를 갖죠. 다른 적임자분은 없을까요?

1000657789.english: The party's about to start, so...

1000657790.english: Mr. Goltharion will probably try to involve the commander again, which is troublesome.
1000657790.korean: 골타리온 씨가 또 사령관님을 끌어들이자고 하실 텐데, 곤란하군요.

1000657792.english: ... Even if half the world can't, I can.
1000657792.korean: ...세계의 절반은 몰라도 저는 드릴 수 있는데.

1000657793.english: What would you like to do?

1000657794.english: Well, I'm not much, but if the boss is satisfied...
1000657794.korean: 이, 일단 변변찮은 저이지만 사장님께서 만족하신다면...

1000657796.english: I thot you'd suggest finding someone else...
1000657796.korean: 다른 분을 찾자고 하실 줄 알았는데...

1000657797.english: I see. So, the reason for reviving the Demon King's army included you, Commander.
1000657797.korean: 그렇군요. 마왕군을 부활시키는 이유 중에 사령관님도 포함되어 있었군요.

1000657799.english: Of course. You don't need to be embarrassed. Because everyone wants to get closer to the commander.
1000657799.korean: 물론이죠. 부끄러워하지 않으셔도 괜찮습니다. 사령관님과 가까워지고 싶어하는 건 모두 마찬가지니까요.

1000657801.english: Wait a moment. You said commander?

1000657802.korean: 아탈란테님? 골타리온이랑 같이 있던 거 아니었나요?

1000657803.english: The hunt is already over. It was weaker than a baby bear.

1000657804.english: But the story you just told. Why was he mentioned?
1000657804.korean: 그런데 방금 전에 하신 이야기. 그분이 왜 거론된 겁니까?

1000657805.english: Oh, that's... The reason the boss came out was...

1000657806.english: Because one of the Demon King's army's objectives is you, Commander.
1000657806.korean: 마왕군의 목적 중 하나가 사령관님이기 때문입니다.

1000657807.english: Is this with the intention of harming?

1000657808.english: Surely we wouldn't cause any harm. However.

1000657809.english: I'll be here to help you so you can laugh and enjoy yourselves.
1000657809.korean: 웃고 즐기실 수 있게, 옆에서 도와드리려고 합니다.

1000657810.english: So you can laugh and enjoy yourselves... Hmm...

1000657811.english: Faucre, is the proposal from earlier still valid?
1000657811.korean: 뽀끄루님. 아까 전의 제안, 아직 유효하나요?

1000657812.english: The fact that you're asking that means...!

1000657813.english: If the contract period is fixed and the conditions are clear... And if it's for him, who is blessed by Olympus, then even Lady Artemis would gladly allow it.
1000657813.korean: 계약기간이 정해져있고, 조건이 명확하다면... 그리고 올림포스의 가호를 받는 그분을 위해서라면, 아르테미스님께서도 기꺼이 허락해주시겠죠.

1000657814.english: It seems I can finally wash away the disgrace of not being able to board the Argonaut this time.
1000657814.korean: 아르곤 호에 오르지 못한 불명예를 이번 기회에나마 씻어낼 수 있겠군요.

1000657815.english: Then take it. It's a contract with darkness.

1000657816.english: ... To be moving around after such an injury... You have incredible durability.

1000657817.english: Kuh-huh-huh...! The power that defies death truly symbolizes Goltharion XIII, the loyal servant of the Great Demon King Faucre.
1000657817.korean: 크흐흐흐...! 죽음을 거스르는 권능이야말로 뽀끄루 대마왕님의 심복, 골타리온 XIII세를 상징하지.

1000657818.english: Atalanta... No, "Beast of Ruin"! I acknowledged you. Welcome to the Demon King's army.
1000657818.korean: 아탈란테... 아니 "파멸의 마수"여! 나는 널 인정했다. 마왕군에 합류한 걸 환영한다.

1000657820.english: Wait a moment. Is there another clause about the outfit, like with me?
1000657820.korean: 잠깐. 또 저처럼 복장 관련 조항이 있는 것 아닙니까?

1000657822.english: Now that Atalanta has joined us, only one spot remains!
1000657822.korean: 아탈란테님께서 들어와주셨으니 이제 남은 건 한 자리!

1000657823.english: Only the Sea Dragon Corps is left!

1000657824.english: Once we attach it here... yes! The ecological conservation zone will be complete.
1000657824.korean: 여기만 붙이면... 응! 생태 보전 구역은 끝이에요.

1000657825.english: By now, the others should have put up all their flyers, right?
1000657825.korean: 지금쯤이면 다른 분들도 전단지를 다 붙이셨겠죠?

1000657826.english: Hehe, with this, the Demon King's Army will soon...

1000657828.english: Judging by your outfit, you seem to have a taste similar to mine.
1000657828.korean: 옷차림을 보니 나랑 비슷한 취향을 가진 것 같긴 한데.

1000657829.english: But putting up notices without permission is illegal. Did you get approval?
1000657829.korean: 허가 없이 공고문을 부착하는 건 위법이야. 허락은 맡았어?

1000657830.english: Sadius?! Is there such a law? It's the first time I've heard of it...
1000657830.korean: 사디어스님?! 그, 그런 법률도 있었나요? 전 처음 들어봤는데...

1000657831.english: There are so many people putting up weird notices these days. It's a newly enacted law this time, but a law is a law.
1000657831.korean: 이상한 공고문을 붙이는 애들이 워낙 많아야지. 이번에 새로 제정된 법률이긴 한데, 법은 법이다.

1000657832.english: Behave and come along quietly. If you want to resist... well, do as you please.
1000657832.korean: 얌전히 따라와. 저항하고 싶으면... 뭐, 맘대로 해.

1000657833.english: Then I can do as I please too.
1000657833.korean: 그러면 나도 맘대로 할 수 있으니까.

1000657838.english: Kuhahahahaha! Have you come to save us?

1000657840.english: Did everyone come here because of the flyers?

1000657841.english: I was caught for public indecency at the party.

1000657842.english: Even though the regulations were relaxed for the party, excessive exposure is still...
1000657842.korean: 파티 때문에 규정이 풀어졌어도 역시 지나친 노출도라...

1000657845.english: That's the ninth time I've heard that sound already. Just be quiet, I'll let you go as soon as the questioning is over.
1000657845.korean: 벌써 9번째 그 소리다. 사정 청취만 끝나면 풀어줄 테니까, 조용해라.

1000657846.english: It's shameful to be alive after enduring such humiliation. Kill him!
1000657846.korean: 이런 수모를 겪고도 살아있는 게 수치다. 죽여라!

1000657847.english: As a servant of the goddess Artemis, this humiliation...!
1000657847.korean: 아르테미스 여신님을 모시는 자로서 이런 치욕을...!

1000657849.english: Atalanta, what were you arrested for?

1000657850.english: A fully grown adult was brought in for walking around in just their pajamas.
1000657850.korean: 다 큰 성인이 잠옷 하나만 입고 돌아다닌다고 잡혀왔습니다.

1000657851.english: They said there wasn't a specific charge, but they were worried about something else.
1000657851.korean: 특정한 죄목은 없는데 다른 게 걱정되신다더군요.

1000657852.english: It's my fault for ambiguously increasing the area of the costume.
1000657852.korean: 복장 면적을 애매하게 늘린 제 탓입니다.

1000657853.english: The Witch of Karma, it's not all your fault. I just should have pushed harder.
1000657853.korean: 업화의 마녀, 너만의 잘못은 아니다. 내가 좀 더 강하게 밀어붙였어야 했을뿐.

1000657854.english: Even if I could go back to that time, I would have stopped you again.
1000657854.korean: 다시 그 때로 돌아가도 제가 말렸을 겁니다.

1000657855.english: Isn't the bear sticker worse than me?

1000657856.english: The results are out. They're all first-time offenders and haven't been behaving badly, so it's okay to let them go.
1000657856.korean: 결과 나왔다. 다들 초범이고 행실이 나쁘지 않아서 풀어줘도 되겠군.

1000657857.english: But if you put up a notice without permission again... You know without me having to say it, right? Get the proper permits.
1000657857.korean: 하지만 또 허가 없이 공고문을 붙이면... 말 안 해도 알겠지? 제대로 허가 받아.

1000657858.english: Um... If I apply now, when can I expect the results?
1000657858.korean: 어... 지금 신청하면 언제쯤 결과가 나올까요?

1000657859.english: It'll take at least a month. Because everyone is busy preparing for the party.
1000657859.korean: 적어도 한달은 걸리겠지. 파티 준비 때문에 다들 바쁘니까.

1000657860.english: Uh...? Then it'll be too late...

1000657861.english: I just need to find one more person...

1000657862.english: Don't worry, Great Demon King. Just in time, there is a worthy candidate right before us to lead the Sea Dragon Corps.
1000657862.korean: 걱정마십시오, 대마왕님. 마침 마룡군단의 군단장으로 걸맞은 인재가 눈앞에 있지 않습니까.

1000657865.english: What? Are you pointing at me?

1000657866.english: That's right. The electric aura I sense from you—

1000657867.english: It's definitely the Thunder Dragon of Annihilation... reincarnated in another form.
1000657867.korean: 틀림없이 멸절의 뇌전룡의 그것이군... 다른 몸으로 환생한 건가.

1000657869.english: Goltharion? Enough. The electricity from Sadias's whip—uugh!
1000657869.korean: 골타리온? 그만 하세요. 사디어스님의 채찍에서 전기가... 으앙!

1000657873.english: Won't you join the Demon King's Army?

1000657874.english: If you won't join, then state your demands—working conditions, desired salary, everything.
1000657874.korean: 마왕군이 되지 않겠다면 원하는 조건을 제시해라. 근로조건부터 희망 연봉까지.

1000657875.english: Is that all you have to say?

1000657876.english: The crime of mocking public authority won't go unpunished!
1000657876.korean: 공권력을 농락한 죄, 가볍지 않을 거다!

1000657882.english: Stop blaming yourself. It was just a misunderstanding between each other.
1000657882.korean: 그만 자책하십시오. 서로간에 오해가 있었던 것뿐이잖습니까.

1000657883.english: By the way, if we can't post the announcement... that would be troublesome. There's hardly enough time to find another candidate.
1000657883.korean: 그나저나 공고문을 못 붙이게 되면... 곤란하군요. 다른 인재를 구하기도 빠듯한 시간입니다.

1000657884.english: We were almost done... I'm sorry, everyone.
1000657884.korean: 조금만 있으면 다 됐는데... 죄송해요, 여러분들.

1000657885.english: I should have prepared thoroughly beforehand and made the proposal. I ended up wasting everyone's time for nothing.
1000657885.korean: 사전에 철저히 준비해서 제안했어야 되는 건데. 괜히 다른 분들의 시간까지 뺏었네요.

1000657886.english: The Demon King's army will disband.

1000657889.english: Yes. It's impossible to meet the deadline anyway, and I'd only be a burden to you all.
1000657889.korean: 네. 어차피 시간에 맞추는 것도 무리고, 여러분에게 짐만 되니까.

1000657890.english: So... I'm sorry, I should have prepared more carefully...
1000657890.korean: 그러니까... 죄송해요, 제가 꼼꼼히 준비했어야 됐는데...

1000657893.english: It's not over yet, please don't be disheartened.

1000657894.english: It's too soon to call it quits before it's truly over.

1000657896.english: Haven't you found the right talent to lead the Demon Dragon Corps?&nWith this, the revival of the Demon King's army is essentially in the final countdown.
1000657896.korean: 마룡군단을 이끌기 걸맞은 인재를 찾지 않았습니까. 이로써 마왕군 부활은 초읽기나 마찬가지입니다.

1000657897.english: I will persuade them to join.

1000657898.english: But... you were so opposed to it earlier...

1000657899.english: From now on, please trust and wait only for me, Goltharion, the Demon King's loyal subordinate.
1000657899.korean: 지금부터는 마왕님의 심복인 저, 골타리온만 믿고 기다려 주십시오.

1000657900.english: I will bring back successful results by the end of today.

1000657902.english: ...What is it? Why have you been following me since earlier?

1000657903.english: Do you want to get scolded again?

1000657904.english: This is a continuation of the proposal I made last time.

1000657905.english: Join the Demon King's army. The Brain Lightning Dragon of Extermination!

1000657906.english: Still mocking the authorities, huh? You haven't come to your senses.
1000657906.korean: 아직도 공권력을 농락하다니. 정신 못 차렸군.

1000657909.english: Hahaha! So something like that happened with Inspector Kyungjeong?

1000657910.english: Kuhuhuhu... Indeed! That's why I came to begin my assault from around the Brain Lightning Dragon of Extermination...
1000657910.korean: 크흐흐흐... 그렇다! 그래서 멸절의 뇌전룡의 주변부터 공략하러 왔지...

1000657911.english: How does the fruit of corruption you're eating taste, Inspector Pupp Head...? Kuhuhuhu...! Hahahahahahahaha!
1000657911.korean: 지금 먹고 있는 타락의 열매는 어떤 맛인가, 펍헤드 경위...? 크흐흐흐....! 크하하하하하하하하!

1000657912.english: It truly lives up to being a top-grade lithium battery! What a supreme flavor!

1000657913.english: Mmm, I see! I shall assist you when you try to persuade the inspector!
1000657913.korean: 음음, 알겠네! 내 자네가 경정님을 설득할 때 도와주도록 함세!

1000657914.english: You followed me all the way here? And this... is that a bribe?
1000657914.korean: 여기까지 쫓아왔나. 게다가 이건... 뇌물 수수?

1000657916.english: This upstanding young man here says he wants to work on a mission with Inspector Kyungjeong.
1000657916.korean: 여기 있는 건실한 청년이 경정님과 함께 일을 하나 하고 싶다는군.

1000657917.english: With this level of sincerity, surely you can accept him! Hahaha!
1000657917.korean: 이 정도 정성이면 받아줘야 되지 않겠나! 하하하!

1000657918.english: Kuhuhuhu... This is your last chance, Brain Lightning Dragon of Extermination.
1000657918.korean: 크흐흐흐... 이번이 마지막 기회다, 멸절의 뇌전룡.

1000657920.english: ...My head hurts so much, I could die.

1000657921.english: This time, I won't let you go quietly, criminal.

1000657924.english: How long are you planning to keep following me?!

1000657928.english: Didn't I say I was serious?

1000657930.english: Join the Demon King's army and support Great Demon King Faucre by their side!
1000657930.korean: 마왕군에 들어와서, 뽀끄루 대마왕님을 옆에서 보좌해다오!

1000657931.english: You fool, do you think I'll just...!

1000657932.english: Stand up! It's just the formation of the Demon King's army!
1000657932.korean: 일어나! 고작 마왕군 결성 따위가 뭐라고!

1000657933.english: Great Demon King Faucre has, for the first time, said they want to rebuild the Demon King's army.
1000657933.korean: 뽀끄루 대마왕님께서 처음으로 마왕군을 재건하자 하셨다.

1000657935.english: I know... that the Great Demon King has another purpose.
1000657935.korean: 알고 있다, 대마왕님께서 다른 목적이 있다는 것 정도는.

1000657936.english: That reviving the Demon King's Army isn't really about world domination...
1000657936.korean: 마왕군을 부활시키는 첫번째 이유가 세계정복이 아니라는 걸...

1000657937.english: Even so...! The Great Demon King personally...!

1000657938.english: He asked me, Goltharion, to help revive the Demon King's Army for the first time...!
1000657938.korean: 이 골타리온에게, 처음으로 마왕군을 부활시키자고 제안해 주셨는데...!

1000657939.english: As his loyal servant, isn't it only right that I do everything in my power—by any means necessary—to assist him?!
1000657939.korean: 심복으로서 힘 닿는 데까지, 수단과 방법을 가리지 않고 도와드리는 게 당연하지 않은가!

1000657942.english: Be the strength of Great Demon King Faucre. I beg you...

1000657944.english: We've got someone like you on our side too.
1000657944.korean: 우리 쪽에도 너같은 녀석이 하나 있지.

1000657945.english: He used to go on about being a war machine, or begging us to remove his personality module...&nBut both of them—it's annoying how ridiculously soft-hearted they turned out to be...
1000657945.korean: 자신이 전쟁병기라느니, 인격모듈을 제거해달라라느니 하던 놈인데... 둘 다 짜증날 정도로 순해 터져가지고는...

1000657948.english: Just hearing that is embarrassing—so keep it down.

1000657949.english: Only until the party's over. After that, it's like no contract ever existed.
1000657949.korean: 파티가 끝날 때까지만이다. 그 이후엔 어떤 계약도 없었던 거야.

1000657952.english: A standard labor contract? What are these clauses?

1000657953.english: No need to read it in detail. It's just formalities—just sign it.
1000657953.korean: 자세히 읽지 않아도 된다. 형식적인 거니까 싸인만 해라.

1000657955.english: Fine. I just need to sign both copies, right?

1000657957.english: Kuhahaha...! Great Demon King, I have successfully persuaded the Thunder Dragon of Annihilation.

1000657959.english: I was foolish to trust you...

1000657961.english: Thunder Dragon of Annihilation, that attire fits the dress code stated in the contract you signed.
1000657961.korean: 멸절의 뇌전룡. 네가 서명한 계약서에 적힌 규정에 맞는 복장이다.

1000657962.english: Don't tell me you're going to pretend you didn't check!
1000657962.korean: 설마 확인하지 못했다고 변명할 셈은 아니겠지!

1000657963.english: You crazy fool, the one who said it was just a formal contract...!
1000657963.korean: 정신 나간 녀석, 형식적인 계약서라던 놈이...!

1000657964.english: Ha, whatever. So, what do I have to do now?
1000657964.korean: 하, 됐어. 그래서 뭘 하면 되는데.

1000657965.english: Since it's come to this, might as well enjoy it.
1000657965.korean: 기왕 이렇게 된 거 즐기기라도 해야지.

1000657967.english: I told you to make sure I witness every contract signing, Goltharion.
1000657967.korean: 계약할 때 꼭 절 참관시켜달라고 말씀드렸잖습니까, 골타리온 씨.

1000657968.english: Kuhahaha! There was no rule saying it had to be only during working hours!
1000657968.korean: 크하하하하! 근무시간 외에도 그래야 한다는 말은 없었다.

1000657969.english: This is truly the way of our Demon King's Army—evil at its finest! Isn't that right, Great Demon King Faucre?
1000657969.korean: 이것이야말로 우리 마왕군, 악의 방식! 그렇지 않습니까, 뽀끄루 대마왕님!

1000657970.english: Now that everyone's gathered, it's time to begin.

1000657971.english: Oh gods of Olympus, please bless their path...
1000657971.korean: 올림포스의 신들이시여, 부디 이들의 앞길에 축복을...

1000657972.english: Goltharion... whimper... really, not even a day has passed...
1000657972.korean: 골타리온... 히잉... 정말 하루도 안 돼서...

1000657973.english: I thought it was over... You've worked hard... Thank you... sob
1000657973.korean: 끝난 줄 알았는데... 고생 많으셨어요... 고마워요오... 훌쩍.

1000657975.english: With this, the newly born Demon King's Army is revived!

1000657976.english: From now on, we'll recruit more fighters and grow our power—

1000657977.english: Huh? Where's that chainsaw sound coming from...?

1000657982.english: The tarts are all done, but we ran out of cake ingredients!
1000657982.korean: 타르트는 다 만들었는데, 케이크 재료가 떨어졌어!

1000657983.english: Nereid, do we still have any whipped cream left?

1000657984.english: Wait a minute! Let me put down the ingredients I just brought... Ah!
1000657984.korean: 잠깐만! 방금 가져온 재료부터 바닥에 놓고... 앗!

1000657985.english: Undine, behind you! Look behind you!

1000657986.english: Eek?! When did it start boiling like this?!

1000657987.english: Ah~! I have to make the syrup again...

1000657988.english: Are you okay? Should I help you from the side?

1000657989.english: No, I'm fine. I just need to boil it with some juice and sugar.
1000657989.korean: 아냐, 괜찮아. 과즙이랑 설탕만 넣고 끓이면 되니까.

1000657990.english: Just the fact that the deputy chief made the dough earlier was a huge help. The rest...
1000657990.korean: 아까 부함장님이 생지 만들어준 것만 해도 엄청 도움됐어. 나머지는...

1000657991.english: There's still plenty of drinks left. Come help out!

1000657992.english: Ugh... My arms have been about to fall off for a while now. Can you take over for me?
1000657992.korean: 우으으... 아까부터 팔 떨어질 것 같아. 교대 좀 해줘.

1000657993.english: Ah~! If I had known it'd be like this, I would've prepared in advance.
1000657993.korean: 아~! 이럴 줄 알았으면 미리 준비해두는 건데.

1000657994.english: Even those in charge of the main dishes probably didn't expect things to get this big.
1000657994.korean: 메인 요리를 담당하는 분들도 이렇게까지 규모가 커질 줄은 몰랐을 거예요.

1000657995.english: It's a party we all enjoy together, so we should help out too. We all want it to go well.
1000657995.korean: 다 함께 즐기는 파티니 우리도 도와드려야야죠. 잘 되길 바라는 마음은 모두가 같으니까요.

1000657997.english: Do you think this will be finished by today?

1000657998.english: I brought the whipped cream. All of what was left!

1000657999.english: Isn't it lacking? If you need more, Neri will go to the kitchen!
1000657999.korean: 부족하지 않아? 더 필요하면 네리가 주방에 다녀올게!

1000658000.english: Ugh... I think it will be lacking. I'm sorry, but I have a favor to ask.
1000658000.korean: 으... 부족할 것 같아. 미안한데 부탁할게.

1000658001.english: What! We're all working hard together, aren't we?

1000658002.english: But what about our song? Is it going according to plan?
1000658002.korean: 근데 우리 노래는 어떻게 해? 계획대로 진행해?

1000658003.english: Oh yeah, the song! I was forgetting.

1000658004.english: The main stage is about to start, so I need to prepare properly...

1000658005.english: Even tho we didn't have much practice time, we practiced every day, didn't we?

1000658006.english: It will be enough to rehearse it during the final rehearsal. Don't be nervous.
1000658006.korean: 최종 리허설에서 맞춰보는 걸로 충분할 거예요. 긴장하지 마세요.

1000658007.english: That's right! Neri's skills have improved a lot too.

1000658008.english: Even the Muse praised it, saying it was exhilarating just to listen to!
1000658008.korean: 뮤즈가 듣기만 해도 흥겹다고 칭찬까지 해줬다구!

1000658009.english: You were so excited and kept messing up the rhythm, so that's why I was being indirect.
1000658009.korean: 혼자 신나서 자꾸 박자를 틀리니 돌려 말한 거야, 그거.

1000658010.english: Kyahahaha! Well, it's true that my skills have improved. Because I was training you by your side.
1000658010.korean: 꺄하핫! 뭐, 실력이 는 건 사실이야. 내가 옆에서 트레이닝 해줬으니까.

1000658011.english: Sorry to interrupt, but it's really urgent, okay?! I need to finish quickly and practice the song.
1000658011.korean: 이야기 중에 미안한데 진짜 급하거든?! 빨리 끝내고 노래까지 연습해야 돼.

1000658012.english: Neri! Please get the ingredients listed on the note. It's really urgent, so please hurry.
1000658012.korean: 네레이드! 쪽지에 적은 재료들 부탁해. 진짜 급하니까 서둘러 줘.

1000658015.english: ... I'm already looking forward to it.

1000658019.english: I'm looking forward to seeing how happy the master will be when they see what we've prepared.
1000658019.korean: 주인님이 저희가 준비한 걸 보고, 기뻐하실 모습이 기대돼요.

1000658020.english: ... Kya-ha-hat! I think the other kids will be like that too.
1000658020.korean: ...꺄하핫! 저희 말고 다른 애들도 그럴 걸요.

1000658021.english: If you're not happy, I'll force-feed you my special cheesecake. What was all that suffering for?!
1000658021.korean: 안 기뻐하면 내 특제 치즈케이크를 마구 먹여버릴 거야. 뭐 때문에 우리가 고생한 건데!

1000658026.english: Oh, I have to make it again!

1000658027.english: - It's been several days since I've been lounging around in the captain's cabin.

1000658028.english: - Vacations are only fun at first; as the days go by, I felt myself becoming more and more lazy. I decided to do even a simple workout.
1000658028.korean: - 휴가도 처음만 즐겁지, 날이 갈수록 나태해진다는 생각이 들었다. 간단한 운동이라도 하자고 마음 먹었다.

1000658029.english: Fish swim, birds fly, and humans run.
1000658029.korean: - 물고기는 헤엄치고, 새는 날고, 인간은 달린다.

1000658030.english: - I'm running in the ecological conservation area to stretch my legs and...
1000658030.korean: - 몸도 풀겸, 생태 보전 구역을 달리고 있는데...

1000658031.english: This is Cafe Horizon! We also have warm coffee and delicious desserts!
1000658031.korean: 카페 호라이즌입니다! 따뜻한 커피랑 맛있는 디저트도 있어요!

1000658032.english: Everyone, try a bite. It's incredibly delicious!
1000658032.korean: 다들 맛 한번 보고 가. 엄청 맛있어!

1000658033.english: - I see Nereid promoting in front of the fountain.

1000658034.english: - She's actively promoting it, just like a Nereid. Should I just take one and go?
1000658034.korean: - 네레이드답게 활발하게 홍보 중이다. 한장 받고 갈까.

1000658035.english: This is Cafe Horizon! Warm coffee... Huh?

1000658036.english: Commander...? No, Master! Why are you here?!
1000658036.korean: 사령관...? 아니, 주인님! 왜 여기 있어?!

1000658038.english: - Nereid, upon seeing me, fidgeted awkwardly in her stance.
1000658038.korean: - 나를 본 네레이드는 엉거주춤한 자세로 꼼지락거렸다.

1000658039.english: It's nothing! This is a coupon. If you take it to the store, you can get a free drink.
1000658039.korean: 아무 것도 아냐! 이거 쿠폰. 가게에 가져가면 공짜로 한잔 마실 수 있어.

1000658040.english: So, go ahead. I'll hand these out and then leave.
1000658040.korean: 그러니까 먼저 가있어. 난 이거 나눠주고 갈게.

1000658042.english: - When I opened the basket hanging on Nereid's arm, it was full of flyers. It's going to take quite a while to hand them all out...
1000658042.korean: - 네레이드의 팔에 걸린 바구니를 열어 보니 전단지로 가득했다. 다 나눠주려면 꽤 걸리겠는데...

1000658043.english: No! It's okay, you can go ahead. Neri is enough on her own!
1000658043.korean: 아냐! 괜찮으니까 먼저 가있어. 네리 혼자서도 충분해!

1000658044.english: - Despite Nereid's refusal, I cupped my hands around my mouth and shouted with all my might.
1000658044.korean: - 네레이드의 거절에도, 나는 입가에 손바닥을 대고 힘껏 소리쳤다.

1000658049.english: Wow! It's all been given out already.

1000658050.english: It's all thanks to you, Master. Awesome!

1000658051.english: Hehe! Do you want to go to the cafe right away? Neri will make you a refreshing drink as a thank you.
1000658051.korean: 에헤헷! 바로 카페 갈래? 네리가 보답으로 시원한 음료수 타줄게.

1000658052.english: - After running for a while, I want to take a break and even shout.
1000658052.korean: - 한참 달린 후에 큰소리까지 내서 잠시 쉬고 싶다.

1000658053.english: - Sitting on the bench, I handed the water bottle I had brought to Nereid.
1000658053.korean: - 벤치에 앉으며 들고 왔던 물통을 네레이드에게 건넸다.

1000658054.english: Did you bring water too? This is getting serious, Master.

1000658055.english: That's perfect, I was just thirsty. Gulp, gulp... Haha! That was delicious, Master! Here!
1000658055.korean: 마침 목 말랐는데 잘 됐다. 꿀꺽꿀꺽... 푸하! 잘 마셨어, 주인님! 여기!

1000658057.english: Are you going to drink it like that? Neri drank from it, so if I drink from it directly...
1000658057.korean: 그, 그대로 마시게? 네리가 입대고 마셔서, 그거 그대로 마시면...

1000658059.english: - Their nervous reaction was amusing. As I was about to bring the water bottle to my mouth, Nereid, with a mournful expression, clung to me, trying to snatch it away.
1000658059.korean: - 안절부절 못하는 반응이 재밌었다. 입에 물병을 갖다대려 하니, 울상이 된 네레이드가 뺏으려고 달라붙어왔다.

1000658060.english: Ouch! Stop it, give it here!

1000658061.english: - Just as they were about to snatch the water bottle, I quickly put it to my lips and drank it down.
1000658061.korean: - 물병을 빼앗기려는 순간, 재빨리 입을 대고 마셔버렸다.

1000658063.english: What if you drink that straight?! Neri drank from it with her mouth!
1000658063.korean: 그걸 그대로 마시면 어떡해! 네리가 입 대고 마신 거란 말이야!

1000658064.english: It's not that it's impossible, but... Still...

1000658066.english: - Nereid's shy reaction was so refreshing that I couldn't help but laugh.

1000658067.english: - How did Nereid, who used to love exercising and was so easygoing, end up becoming such a shy person?
1000658067.korean: - 운동을 좋아하고, 털털하던 네레이드가 어쩌다 부끄럼쟁이가 됐을까.

1000658068.english: Why are you laughing! Neri is really scary when she gets angry too!
1000658068.korean: 왜 웃어! 네리도 화내면 진짜 무섭거든!

1000658070.english: ... That was when I didn't know anything.

1000658071.english: Even though I knew what the man and woman were doing, the commander felt like a close friend...
1000658071.korean: 남자랑 여자가 뭘 하는지 알고 있어도, 사령관은 친한 친구 같았는데...

1000658072.english: Ever since that day, I can only see him as a man... Of course you'd be aware.
1000658072.korean: 그날부터 남자로밖에 안 보이니까... 의식하는 게 당연하잖아.

1000658073.english: - He put down the water bottle and nodded.

1000658074.english: The commander is aware of me? Liar.

1000658075.english: - Everyone gets nervous in front of someone they like.
1000658075.korean: - 좋아하는 사람 앞에서 긴장하는 건 모두가 마찬가지다.

1000658076.english: - When you try to look good and show a more impressive side of yourself than you are now, it's inevitable that you'll tense up.
1000658076.korean: - 잘 보이려고, 지금보다 멋진 모습을 보여주려다 보면 몸에 힘이 들어가는 건 어쩔 수 없다.

1000658077.english: - With time, people usually become more at ease, but since this is all new to Nereid, it'll just take a little longer.
1000658077.korean: - 시간이 지나면 여유가 생기기 마련인데, 네레이드는 이번에 모든 게 처음이니까. 조금 더 걸리는 거겠지.

1000658079.english: Uh... really? Does the commander get all like that every time he sees Neri? He doesn't seem any different from usual.
1000658079.korean: 어... 진짜? 사령관도 네리 볼 때마다 막 그래? 평소랑 다를 게 없어 보이는데.

1000658081.english: Neri, this is all new to the commander too.
1000658081.korean: 네리, 이런 거 전부 사령관이 처음이란 말이야.

1000658082.english: But since the commander's the only one who's relaxed... I feel like I'm the only one falling behind. So unfair.
1000658082.korean: 근데 사령관만 여유 있으니까... 혼자 뒤처진 것 같아. 치사해.

1000658083.english: - I took Nereid's hand. Even though she was new to romance, the shy girl slowly clasped mine in return.
1000658083.korean: - 네레이드의 손을 잡았다. 연애가 처음인 소녀도 수줍어하면서 천천히 맞잡아왔다.

1000658085.english: Heheh, since it's the commander saying it—no, since it's the master saying it, it has to be true. Neri will get used to it someday!
1000658085.korean: 에헤헷, 사령관이 하는 말이니까. 아니, 주인님이 하는 말이니까 틀림 없겠지. 네리도 언젠가 익숙해질게!

1000658087.english: I don't think I'll ever get used to this outfit.
1000658087.korean: 이 옷은, 아무래도 익숙해질 거 같지 않아.

1000658088.english: Because, well... this is the kind of outfit you wear for sexy scenes. I'm wearing it to show the master, but still...
1000658088.korean: 왜, 왜냐면... 이거, 야한 거 할 때 입는 옷이잖아. 주인님한테 보여주려고 입은 거긴 한데, 그래도...

1000658090.english: - They must have said that because they were really embarrassed... He probably didn't realize how provocative his remarks were, but...
1000658090.korean: - 정말로 부끄러워서 한 말이겠지... 자신이 얼마나 자극적인 발언을 했는지 자각하지 못했겠지, 하지만...

1000658091.english: Skipping out? No way! We're still open. Neri, you have to go help too.
1000658091.korean: 땡땡이? 안 돼! 아직 영업 중이야. 네리도 가서 도와야 돼.

1000658092.english: Yeah. Thanks to the master, we finished quickly.

1000658093.english: ...Is that so? Now that you mention it, yeah.

1000658094.english: Heheh, got it! Neri likes to have fun too. So, what are we playing?
1000658094.korean: 에헤헷, 알았어! 네리도 노는 거 좋아하니까. 뭐하고 놀 건데?

1000658095.english: Master? Why are you staring like that...? Huh? My clothes?!
1000658095.korean: 주인님? 뭘 그렇게 뚫어져라 보는... 응? 내 옷?!

1000658097.english: Master, am I thinking what you're thinking...?
1000658097.korean: 주인님, 내가 생각하고 있는 거... 맞아?

1000658099.english: - Knowing the purpose of the clothes, the Nereid blushed but didn't let go of my hand and followed me.
1000658099.korean: - 옷의 사용처를 알고 있는 네레이드는 얼굴을 붉히면서도 내 손을 놓지 않고 따라왔다.

1000658100.english: - I begged them to let me go, saying I had to return later, but...

1000658101.english: - That day, Nereid was unable to return to the cafe.

1000658102.english: Whew... That should be enough stirring. Let's have a taste.
1000658102.korean: 후우... 이만큼 휘저었으면 됐겠지. 어디 맛 좀 볼까.

1000658103.english: Mmm, sweet! That was well hit. Mixed with lemon custard... Wow!
1000658103.korean: 음~ 달콤해! 잘 쳐졌네. 레몬 커스터드랑 섞어서... 와!

1000658104.english: Delicious~! Is this really something I made? Are you a real genius?
1000658104.korean: 맛있어~! 정말 내가 만든 거 맞아? 진짜 천재 아니야?

1000658105.english: Okay! Decided on the new menu. That's going to sell like hotcakes!
1000658105.korean: 좋아! 신 메뉴로 결정. 불티나게 팔리겠는 걸!

1000658107.english: Mumu, what's going on! When did you get here?!

1000658108.english: If you're here, at least say you're here!

1000658109.english: - I came in and said hello, but they must have been so focused on cooking that they didn't hear me.
1000658109.korean: - 들어와서 인사했는데, 요리에 집중해서 못 들었나보다.

1000658110.english: Don't even mention it! My heart skipped a beat.
1000658110.korean: 말도 마! 심장 떨어지는 줄 알았어.

1000658111.english: I've been getting startled a lot lately. If he had been holding a knife, it could have been dangerous.
1000658111.korean: 요즘 들어 자꾸 깜짝깜짝 놀라네. 칼이라도 들고 있었으면 위험할 뻔했어.

1000658112.english: Yeah. Sia came over last time too.

1000658114.english: Hey, research! Okay, I was researching.

1000658115.english: Anyway, that worked out perfectly. Did you eat?
1000658115.korean: 그나저나 마침 잘 됐네. 밥 먹었어?

1000658116.english: - I was going back to eat, but I was drawn in by the sweet smell.
1000658116.korean: - 돌아가서 식사하려는데 달콤한 냄새에 이끌려 왔다.

1000658117.english: What do you take me for?

1000658118.english: The genius pastry chef, Undine! If there's anything you want to eat, just say it. I'll make it for you right away.
1000658118.korean: 천재 파티시에르, 운디네라구! 뭐든 먹고 싶은 거 있으면 말해. 금방 만들어줄 테니까.

1000658120.english: ... Oh, that! That kind of thing can be made in no time!
1000658120.korean: ...아, 그거! 그 정도야 금방 만들 수 있지!

1000658121.english: Hmph! Are you doubting me right now? Just wait a little bit.
1000658121.korean: 흐흥! 지금 날 의심하는 거야? 조금만 기다려.

1000658122.english: I'll serve it to you in a flash!

1000658124.english: How is it? Is this right?

1000658125.english: Hurry up and eat it. You'll be surprised!

1000658126.english: - It was something Undine could be confident about. It was delicious. It melts gently in your mouth, and when you swallow, the lemon flavor lingers on your tongue.
1000658126.korean: - 운디네가 자신 있어 할 만했다. 맛있었다. 입에 넣으면 살살 녹아내리고, 목구멍으로 넘기면 혀 위에 레몬 풍미가 감돈다.

1000658127.english: I told you, she's a genius pastry chef.

1000658128.english: Is there anything else you want to eat? Tell me everything that comes to mind.
1000658128.korean: 더 먹고 싶은 거 없어? 생각나는 거 전부 얘기해.

1000658129.english: - As I mentioned the names of the desserts I saw in the information storage area, Undine nodded vigorously.
1000658129.korean: - 정보 보관 구역에서 본 디저트의 명칭들을 얘기하자, 운디네가 힘차게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000658131.english: - Confidently answering and entering the kitchen, Undine soon began cooking. Whisking as if I had multiple bodies, I also adjusted the oven.
1000658131.korean: - 자신만만하게 대답하고 주방에 들어간 운디네는 곧 요리를 시작했다. 몸이 여러 개라도 되는 것처럼 휘핑을 치다가도 오븐을 조정했다.

1000658132.english: - Watching Undine's back as she skillfully cooks, it's just like...
1000658132.korean: - 능숙히 조리하는 운디네의 뒷모습을 보고 있자니 꼭...

1000658134.english: Ugh, of all times, when I was drinking juice... Cough!
1000658134.korean: 하, 하필 주스 마시고 있을 때... 콜록!

1000658135.english: Okay, it's fine... Cough, cough! Don't say things like that all of a sudden! You choked!
1000658135.korean: 됐어, 괜찮... 콜록콜록! 갑자기 그런 말하지 마! 사레 들렸잖아!

1000658137.english: Anyway, is this all you requested? I'm all done.
1000658137.korean: 어쨌든 요청한 거 이게 전부 맞지? 다 만들었어.

1000658138.english: - Did I ask for too much without any shame? I was worried, but Undine made all the desserts in a short amount of time.
1000658138.korean: - 염치없이 많은 걸 부탁한 건 아닌가? 걱정했는데, 운디네는 짧은 시간만에 모든 디저트를 만들어냈다.

1000658139.english: - Everything tastes good. Even though Undine's career as a pastry chef was short, her desserts were above average.
1000658139.korean: - 뭘 먹어도 맛있다. 운디네가 파티시에르로 활약한 경력은 짧았어도 수준급 이상의 디저트였다.

1000658140.english: Hmph! How is it? Now do you believe I'm a super genius pastry chef?
1000658140.korean: 흐흥! 어때? 이제 초천재 파티시에르라는 걸 믿겠어?

1000658141.english: What~? Of course it's from the beginning.

1000658142.english: A genius like me can understand anything just by looking at it once... Huh? Why are you laughing?
1000658142.korean: 나 같은 천재는 한번 보기만 해도 뭐든 금방... 응? 왜 웃어.

1000658143.english: - Just yesterday, I saw Undine order a large quantity of food ingredients. Even after closing hours, they must have practiced without rest.
1000658143.korean: - 어제만 해도 운디네가 대량으로 식재료를 발주한 걸 봤다. 영업이 끝나도 쉬지 않고 연습했겠지.

1000658144.english: - I thot it was very Undine-like of her to attribute her achievements, which were the result of constant effort, to natural talent, and not to gloss over the time she must have struggled.
1000658144.korean: - 끊임없는 노력 끝에 얻어낸 성과를 타고 난 재능이라고, 고생했을 시간을 포장하지 않는 모습이 운디네답다고 생각했다.

1000658145.english: - Even if I brag, I work all nite until I actually get really good.
1000658145.korean: - 허세를 부리더라도 정말 잘하게 될 때까지 밤새 노력하니까.

1000658146.english: Is that it? Is there anything else you want?
1000658146.korean: 그걸로 끝이야? 더 원하는 거 없어?

1000658147.english: - I thought of a menu to ask the smug Undine.

1000658148.english: Cake...? You just ate cake, and you want more?

1000658149.english: What? You wanted cheesecake that badly?
1000658149.korean: 뭐야. 그렇게 치즈 케이크가 먹고 싶었어?

1000658150.english: Understood, Master. Please wait a moment. Oh! What kind do you want to eat? New York, soufflé, rare?
1000658150.korean: 알았어, 주인님. 잠시만 기다려. 아! 어떤 종류가 먹고 싶어? 뉴욕, 수플레, 레어?

1000658151.english: A while ago...? When did I make that for you?

1000658155.english: - The winter before last, when I decided to become Santa.

1000658156.english: - The moment Undine remembered what had happened then, her face flushed instantly.
1000658156.korean: - 그때 무슨 일이 있었는지 떠올린 운디네의 얼굴이 순식간에 달아올랐다.

1000658157.english: That, that wasn't a proper cheesecake! Something else beside that!
1000658157.korean: 그, 그건 제대로 된 치즈 케이크가 아니었잖아! 그거 말고 다른 거!

1000658158.english: - As I took a step forward, the Undine took a step back.
1000658158.korean: - 내가 한발짝 다가가자, 운디네가 한발짝 물러섰다.

1000658159.english: But, still, it's not okay. How do you make that again? That's a waste of food!
1000658159.korean: 그, 그래도 안 돼. 그걸 어떻게 다시 만들어. 식재료 낭비야!

1000658160.english: - Another step. Undine's back is blocked by the cooking area, so she can't retreat any further.
1000658160.korean: - 다시 한발짝. 운디네의 뒤는 조리대로 막혀있어 더 이상 물러날 수 없다.

1000658162.english: - In an atmosphere where it seemed like a little more pushing would get me permission, I took a step back.
1000658162.korean: - 조금만 밀어붙이면 허락할 것 같은 분위기에서 나는 한발짝 물러났다.

1000658164.english: Um... That's right! It's not that I can't make it, but... yeah! I'll make you something else instead. What do you want to eat?
1000658164.korean: 어... 그, 그렇지! 못 만드는 건 아니지만, 응! 대신 다른 거 만들어 줄게. 뭐 먹고 싶어?

1000658167.english: - When I pointed to the special menu on the menu, Undine was very flustered.
1000658167.korean: - 메뉴판에 스페셜 메뉴를 가리키자 운디네가 몹시 당황했다.

1000658168.english: It's not that it's impossible, but... It's a menu item I haven't tried yet...
1000658168.korean: 안 되는 건 아닌데, 그건... 아직 한번도 나가지 않은 메뉴라...

1000658169.english: That's not true! I can get it ready in no time!

1000658171.english: First, go up to the master and greet them.

1000658172.english: After explaining that the special menu is only offered to one person...
1000658172.korean: 스페셜 메뉴는 한 사람에게만 특별 제공되는 거라고 설명한 뒤...

1000658176.english: - Undine lay down on the countertop and pulled at my collar. With them pressed close enough to hear each other's heartbeats, Undine placed her palms on my cheeks.
1000658176.korean: - 운디네가 조리대 위로 누우며 내 옷깃을 잡아당겼다. 서로의 심장소리가 들릴 만큼 밀착한 상태에서 운디네가 내 볼에 두 손바닥을 갖다댔다.

1000658177.english: You know what happens next, Commander...
1000658177.korean: 이 다음부턴 어떻게 되는지 사령관도 잘 알잖아...

1000658179.english: Why not enjoy the things you like first...?

1000658181.english: All of it... You can just eat it.

1000658182.english: - The pâtissière, whose laughter was sweeter than sugar, pulled my face closer.
1000658182.korean: - 설탕보다 달콤한 웃음소리를 흘린 파티시에르가 내 얼굴을 끌어당겼다.

1000658183.english: - The special menu we were treated to afterward was quite satisfying.
1000658183.korean: - 이후에 대접 받은 스페셜 메뉴는 썩 만족스러웠고.

1000658184.english: - When asked if he could order again, the Undine refused, but after persistent pleading, she relented on the condition that it be only once.
1000658184.korean: - 또 다시 주문해도 되냐는 물음에 운디네는 거절했지만, 끈질기게 부탁하니 단 한번이라는 조건으로 허락해줬다.

1000658185.english: Due to circumstances, the store will be closed today. We will be open for regular business hours starting tomorrow. >
1000658185.korean: < 가게 사정상 금일 휴무입니다. 내일부터 정상영업합니다. >

1000658186.english: - I went to the cafe because I was craving dessert and a drink, but it was an unexpected situation.
1000658186.korean: - 디저트와 음료수가 생각나서 카페에 방문했는데 뜻밖의 상황이었다.

1000658187.english: - After coming all this way, I didn't want to just turn back, so I stayed by the door. Wouldn't at least one person stop by the store? I was excited for a moment, but even after a long time, there's still no news.
1000658187.korean: - 기껏 여기까지 왔는데, 그대로 돌아가기 아쉬워서 문앞을 지켰다. 한 명쯤은 가게에 들르지 않을까? 기대한 것도 잠시, 한참이 지나도 소식이 없다.

1000658188.english: - As I stood up from my seat, leaving behind my regret, I saw a Sirene walking toward me from afar.
1000658188.korean: - 아쉬움을 뒤로 하고 자리에서 일어난 순간, 멀리서 걸어오는 세이렌이 보였다.

1000658189.english: Master? What are you doing on your day off?

1000658190.english: Oh... I forgot to mention it. Since someone mentioned needing time to recharge, I decided to take a break for the day.
1000658190.korean: 아... 말씀드리는 걸 깜빡했네요. 재충전할 시간이 필요하다는 얘기가 나와서 오늘 하루는 쉬어가기로 했어요.

1000658192.english: Since I finally have some time, I'm going to clean thoroughly. I couldn't pay attention to the details while we were open.
1000658192.korean: 모처럼 시간이 주어졌으니 꼼꼼히 청소해두려구요. 영업 중엔 세세한 부분까진 신경 쓰지 못했거든요.

1000658193.english: Would you like to come inside? I'll treat you to something refreshing to drink.
1000658193.korean: 안으로 들어오실래요? 시원한 마실 거라도 대접해 드릴게요.

1000658194.english: A simple drink is fine. Serving the master is a maid's duty, after all.
1000658194.korean: 간단한 음료수 정도는 괜찮아요. 주인님에게 봉사하는 게 메이드의 본분이니까요.

1000658197.english: - The cold coffee came out quickly. Even the cup of coffee offered to the unwelcome guest was brought on a tray, showing Sirene's thoughtfulness.
1000658197.korean: - 금방 시원한 커피가 나왔다. 불청객에게 내주는 커피 한 잔조차 쟁반에 담아오는 데서 세이렌의 배려가 느껴졌다.

1000658198.english: Because it's for the master. It's not something you can neglect.
1000658198.korean: 주인님한테 드리는 거니까요. 소홀히 할 수 없죠.

1000658199.english: Please let me know if the concentration is too weak or too strong. I'll adjust it for you.
1000658199.korean: 혹시 농도가 엷거나 진하면 말씀해주세요. 조절해 드릴게요.

1000658201.english: I'll start after I see the master off. You're resting, and we don't want dust flying around.
1000658201.korean: 주인님을 바래다드리고 시작하게요. 쉬고 계신데 먼지가 날리면 안 되니까요.

1000658202.english: Oh! That's not to say I'm rushing you. Since this is entirely for my personal business, you can stay as long as you're comfortable.
1000658202.korean: 아! 그렇다고 재촉하는 건 아니에요. 어디까지나 제 개인 용무니까, 편하신 만큼 있다 가셔도 돼요.

1000658204.english: It's okay, I'm fine! This is a problem with our cafe, and how can I... to someone who's resting?
1000658204.korean: 괘, 괜찮아요! 이건 저희 카페 문제고, 쉬고 계시는 분한테 제가 어떻게...

1000658205.english: - He put down his glass and picked up the mop leaning in the corner.
1000658205.korean: - 잔을 내려놓고 구석에 세워진 밀대를 잡았다.

1000658207.english: - When he stood at attention with the rolling pin, the hesitant Sirene chuckled.
1000658207.korean: - 밀대로 받들어 총 자세를 취하자, 주저하던 세이렌이 쿡쿡 웃었다.

1000658208.english: If you put it that way... I look forward to working with you as well, Master.
1000658208.korean: 그렇게까지 말씀하신다면... 저도 잘 부탁드릴게요, 주인님.

1000658209.english: - And so, the cleaning began in earnest. I dusted the space between the ceiling and the window frames, and carefully wiped away the frost and debris that had accumulated in the refrigerator.
1000658209.korean: - 그렇게 본격적으로 청소가 시작됐다. 천장과 창틀 사이의 먼지를 털어내고, 냉장고에 있던 성에와 이물질들을 꼼꼼히 닦아냈다.

1000658210.english: Yes. Many people enjoy coming here, so we're happy to work here too.
1000658210.korean: 네. 많은 분들께서 즐겨 찾아주셔서 저희도 즐겁게 일하고 있어요.

1000658211.english: I only do cleaning and serving. The other employes must be having a hard time.
1000658211.korean: 저는 청소랑 서빙밖에 안 하는 걸요. 다른 종업원분들이 고생이시죠.

1000658212.english: Yes, the work I'm doing is the easiest and simplest.
1000658212.korean: 네, 제가 하고 있는 일이 가장 쉽고 간단해요.

1000658213.english: Cleaning is something anyone can do, so it's not very helpful. That's why I have to come out even on holidays and manage it more carefully.
1000658213.korean: 청소는 누구나 할 수 있어서 큰 도움이 되지 못하니까. 이렇게 휴일에라도 나와서 더 꼼꼼히 관리해야죠.

1000658214.english: - They continued their conversation while constantly moving the mop.
1000658214.korean: - 쉬지 않고 밀대를 움직이며 대화를 이었다.

1000658215.english: - Seeing Sirene cleaning confirmed it. That they usually work on this scale, even on other days.
1000658215.korean: - 세이렌이 청소하는 걸 보고 확신했다. 평소에도 오늘 같은 규모로 작업한다는 걸.

1000658216.english: - Looking at the cleaning supplies in the corner and the efficiently planned route, it was clear this wasn't their first time cleaning. They probably stayed behind and cleaned even on weekdays.
1000658216.korean: - 구석에 있는 청소 용품들과 효율적으로 짜여진 동선을 보니, 한 두번 대청소한 솜씨가 아니었다. 평일에도 혼자 남아서 청소했겠지.

1000658220.english: Ever since I was little, whenever I had worries or concerns, the master would somehow appear...
1000658220.korean: 옛날부터 제가 고민이나 걱정 같은 걸 갖고 있으면 어느샌가 주인님이 나타나셔서...

1000658221.english: If you tell me it's nothing and to cheer up... Just that one word solves everything.
1000658221.korean: 저한테 별거 아니라고, 기운 내라고 말씀해주시면... 그 한 마디로 모든 게 풀려요.

1000658223.english: - Since we did it together, cleaning the floor was finished quickly. After tidying up the cleaning supplies and odds and ends, and checking the clock, quite a bit of time had passed.
1000658223.korean: - 둘이 하니 바닥 청소도 금방 끝났다. 청소도구와 자질구레한 걸 정리하고 시계를 확인해 보니 꽤나 시간이 지나 있었다.

1000658224.english: It's already time... Sorry, did I take a long time?

1000658225.english: You can go ahead, sir, I just need to ventilate now.
1000658225.korean: 이제 환기만 하면 되니까 먼저 가셔도 돼요, 주인님.

1000658226.english: It's okay, I'll finish up and head back too.

1000658227.english: I've kept you here this long, it wouldn't be right to be so shameless as to do it any longer.
1000658227.korean: 여태까지 주인님을 붙잡아뒀는데 염치없이 더 그래선 안 되겠죠.

1000658228.english: - I expected we'd spend the day together since we were cleaning together. Was it just my imagination?
1000658228.korean: - 같이 청소하면서 오늘 하루는 같이 보낼 거라 예상했는데. 나만의 착각이었나.

1000658229.english: - I weakly waved my hand to Sirene seeing me off.

1000658231.english: If you visit, we'll give you a delicious dessert on the house. Thank you so much for your help.
1000658231.korean: 방문하시면 맛있는 디저트를 서비스로 드릴게요. 도와주셔서 정말 감사드려요.

1000658232.english: - I was walking out of the store after finishing my greetings.

1000658233.english: - I was wondering if it was okay to break up like this when I felt a tug from behind. Did your clothes get caught on something? I turned around and saw...
1000658233.korean: - 이렇게 헤어져도 되나, 고민하고 있는데 뒤에서 당겨지는 느낌이 들었다. 어딘가에 옷이 걸렸나? 뒤를 돌아봤더니.

1000658234.english: - Before I knew it, Sirene had grabbed the hem of my clothes.
1000658234.korean: - 어느새 세이렌이 내 옷자락을 붙잡고 있었다.

1000658236.english: - Even Sirene was flustered, as if she herself didn't understand the situation. You acted on impulse, didn't you?
1000658236.korean: - 본인 스스로도 상황을 이해하지 못했는지 세이렌도 당황했다. 충동적으로 움직인 거구나.

1000658237.english: - Sirene facing me hesitated for a long time, then after taking a deep breath, finally looked me directly in the eye.
1000658237.korean: - 나와 마주보던 세이렌은 한참을 망설이다, 깊은 심호흡을 한 후에야 똑바로 눈을 마주봐왔다.

1000658240.english: Still... Still! I just want to stay with you a little longer, Master.
1000658240.korean: 그래도... 그래도! 조금만 더 주인님과, 같이 있고 싶어요.

1000658241.english: Because everyone wants the master... I shouldn't hog it all...
1000658241.korean: 모두가 주인님을 원하시니까... 제가 독차지하면 안 되는데...

1000658242.english: Just for today, I don't want to let you go...

1000658243.english: Could you stay by my side for just one day, Master?
1000658243.korean: 하루만 제 곁에 있어주시면 안 돼요, 주인님?

1000658244.english: - I've seen Sirene be honest before, but this is the first time they've asked so strongly like this.
1000658244.korean: - 저번에 세이렌이 솔직해진 건 봤지만, 이번처럼 강하게 부탁한 건 처음 겪는다.

1000658245.english: - What if I get rejected? I could sense him worrying if he had been too demanding. I could see the Sirene's fingertips trembling.
1000658245.korean: - 혹시나 거절당하지 않을까. 자신이 무리하게 부탁한 건 아닐까, 고민하는 게 느껴졌다. 세이렌의 손끝이 떨리는 게 보였다.

1000658246.english: - Gently taking her trembling hand, I brought it to my cheek.
1000658246.korean: - 떨고 있는 손을 살며시 잡아 쥐고서 내 볼에 가져다댔다.

1000658249.english: - Even the Sirene, who had been extremely tense due to the unexpected role-playing, burst out laughing.
1000658249.korean: - 때 아닌 상황극에 잔뜩 긴장했던 세이렌도 웃음을 터뜨렸다.

1000658250.english: Heh heh, are you going with that concept?
